Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13018165: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The adaptation of the required SINR for the A-CSI CSI Part1 and, if transmitted, CSI Part2, in the SINR-to-MCS mapping tables as specified in current requirement shall be skipped in any of the cases below: Considering: \- MCSproposed = proposed MCS (i.e. w/o SINR correction); Qm,proposed is the corresponding modulation order \- MCSj = next MCS supported and higher than MCSproposed; Qm,j is the corresponding modulation order \- Ri,uci = _rrmEffCrUciOnPusch = PUSCH coderate after UCI multiplexing, computed for MCSproposed with the procedure in 5G_UP_ALG_5111_replaced([11203602](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (not that this requirement exists before A-CSI, ideally _mcs is a simple parameter in the software).**\- Rproposed, Rj = 3gpp target code rate for the MCSproposed, MCSj as resulting from the MCS table corresponding to PUSCH configuration and documented in TS 38.214 - > _$6.1.4.1 Modulation order and target code rate determination_ SINR correction for A-CSI is not applied if : Qm,proposed ( Ri,uci - Rproposed) < _rdMaxDeltaCodeRateIncreaseRatioWithACsiWithoutSinrCorr * (Qm,j * Rj - Qm,proposed * Rproposed)_ \-  _rdMaxDeltaCodeRateIncreaseRatioWithACsiWithoutSinrCorr is defined during CP3 with default value 20%, range [0...50] % step 1 (see 5G_L2_3765_replaced([11184941](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27u9gPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))._ * A-CSI scheduling in UCI only mode. r _dSkipSinrCorrectionForHighPrbNumber shall be defined during CP3 phase with default value True (see 5G_L2_3765_replaced([11184941](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27u9gPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))._ The adaptation of the required SINR in the SINR-to-MCS mapping tables shall be done temporarily whenever an UCI is carried via PUSCH and hence the required SINR needs to be increased to keep the target BLER in UL. The required SINR shall not be adapted in the SINR-to-MCS mapping tables for slots without UCI on PUSCH. Furthermore, the adaptation of the SINR depends on the number of PRBs the UL scheduler shall grant. Basically, the link adaptation shall take the SINR offset related to large allocations when the ILLA selects the MCS for the UE. The SINR adaptation for PRB allocations smaller than the large allocation shall be taken into account by the FDM scheduler if the MCS needs to be corrected before granted to the UE. For this purpose, the needed SINR offset shall be classified by several criterions and shall be added to the corresponding required SINR value defined by the applied SINR-to-MCS mapping table. First criterion is the type of the UCI carried via PUSCH if UE is not scheduled with 64qamLowSE table:  HARQ A/N indication of 1 bit  HARQ A/N indication of 2 and more bits  CSI Part1 with up to 11 UCI bits (RM coded without CRC)  CSI Part1 between 12 and 19 UCI bits (Polar coded with 6 bit CRC)  CSI Part1 with 20 and more UCI bits (Polar coded with 11 bit CRC) First criterion is the type of the UCI carried via PUSCH if UE is scheduled with 64qamLowSE table:  HARQ A/N indication of 1 bit  HARQ A/N indication of 2...8 bits  HARQ A/N indication of 9...11 bits  HARQ A/N indication of 12 and more bits  CSI Part1 with up to 11 UCI bits (RM coded without CRC)  CSI Part1 between 12 and 19 UCI bits (Polar coded with 6 bit CRC)  CSI Part1 with 20 and more UCI bits (Polar coded with 11 bit CRC) Furthermore, the SINR offset parameter shall considered the number of PRBs, which are granted by the UL scheduler. Basically, three different allocation sizes shall be considered. These are allocations:  between 1 PRB and 13 PRB  between 14 PRB and 23 PRB  more than 23 PRB **if UE is not scheduled with 64qamLowSE table** These are allocations:  between 1 PRB and 15 PRB  between 16 PRB and 24 PRB  more than 24 PRB if UE is scheduled with 64qamLowSE table Finally, the used number of layers in UL shall be taken into account for the definition of the individual SINR offset. [PR853178-26R2] If link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is enabled for UL ([12472235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Of9dYA1aEfCuhewgqkUVKQ)) and an UCI is transmitted via PUSCH, the link adaptation shall take the SINR offset related to the rdNumofColumnSinrOffset (defined in [13018192: rdNumofColumnSinrOffset](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_WfVS5bpdEfCQT7hYUxERAg)) column defined in the following SINR offset tables. [End PR853178-26R2] For each of the SINR offset parameters a corresponding R&D parameter is specified in 5G_L2_1394_replaced([11185322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27xZwvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to 5G_L2_1423_replaced([11185561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27zO9PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if UE is not scheduled with 64qamLowSE table and the relation of the SINR offset values to the SINR-to-MCS mapping tables can be illustrated by two additional tables. The SINR offset parameters, which shall be applied for PUSCH Rank1 transmissions, are defined by the following table.

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
| Allocation Size | 1…13 PRB | 14…23 PRB | >23 PRB  
UCI Size |  |  |  |   
1 A/N bit |  | rdSinrOffsetRank1Harq1BitSmall | rdSinrOffsetRank1Harq1BitMedium | rdSinrOffsetRank1Harq1BitLarge  
>= 2 bit A/N |  | rdSinrOffsetRank1Harq2BitSmall | rdSinrOffsetRank1Harq2BitMedium | rdSinrOffsetRank1Harq2BitLarge  
<= 11 bit CSI Part1 |  | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1RmSmall | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1RmMedium | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1RmLarge  
11…19 bit CSI Part1 |  | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1Polar6Small | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1Polar6Medium | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1Polar6Large  
>= 20 bit CSI Part1 |  | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1Polar11Small | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1Polar11Medium | rdSinrOffsetRank1Csi1Polar11Large  
|  |  |  |   
The next table defines the SINR offset parameters, which shall be used for the adaptation of PUSCH Rank2 transmissions. |  |  |  |   
|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
| Allocation Size | 1…13 PRB | 14…23 PRB | >23 PRB  
UCI Size |  |  |  |   
1 A/N bit |  | rdSinrOffsetRank2Harq1BitSmall | rdSinrOffsetRank2Harq1BitMedium | rdSinrOffsetRank2Harq1BitLarge  
>= 2 bit A/N |  | rdSinrOffsetRank2Harq2BitSmall | rdSinrOffsetRank2Harq2BitMedium | rdSinrOffsetRank2Harq2BitLarge  
<= 11 bit CSI Part1 |  | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1RmSmall | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1RmMedium | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1RmLarge  
11…19 bit CSI Part1 |  | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1Polar6Small | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1Polar6Medium | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1Polar6Large  
>= 20 bit CSI Part1 |  | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1Polar11Small | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1Polar11Medium | rdSinrOffsetRank2Csi1Polar11Large

**3.8.3.1.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `11130549`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Number of CSI Part2 bits considered for SINR adaptation.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11130554`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation L2-PS shall compute the number of CSI Part2 bits considered for SINR adaptation.

L2-PS shall use the same SINR correction coefficients for CSI Part2 as computed for CSI Part1 in 5G_UP_ALG_3145_replaced([11130475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mjvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Though, since the SINR correction parameters for CSI Part1 in 5G_UP_ALG_3145_replaced([11130475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mjvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are computed based on the configured beta offset for CSI Part1 BetaOffsetCsi1, L2-PS shall compute the equivalent number of bits of the CSI Part2 that would generate the same number of modulation symbols (REs) for the CSI Part2 as if it’s using the actual(expected) CSI Part2 size and actual CSI Part2 beta offset betaOffsetCsi2.

Consequently, the number of CSI Part2 bits rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrection considered for the SINR correction shall be computed as follows:

\- Compute the intermediary parameter rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrectionWithCrc:

rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrectionWithCrc = Ceil ((numOfUciCsiPart2PossibleBits + numOfCrcPart2PossibileBits ) x BetaOffsetCsi2 / BetaOffsetCsi1)

\- Compute rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrection by subtracting CRC from rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrectionWithCrc

if rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrectionWithCrc <=11:

rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrection = rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrectionWithCrc

else if rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrectionWithCrc <=25:

rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrection = rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrectionWithCrc - 6

else

rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrection = rrmNumOfCsi2BitsForSinrCorrectionWithCrc - 11

See 5G_UP_ALG_3555_replaced([11159579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKwwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for numOfUciCsiPart2PossibleBits, numOfCrcPart2PossibileBits.

See 5G_UP_ALG_3661_replaced([11160631](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktPCPvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for BetaOffsetCsi2, BetaOffsetCsi1

Note1: When Harq-Ack is present and it’s multiplexed with CSI, it’s possible that Harq-Ack REs punctures CSI Part2 REs. To avoid that L2-PS fully computes the overlapping, a conservative approach is considered, assuming that no puncturing occurs.

---

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation SINR offset calculation for high reliability

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11130707: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11130707: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11130707: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation rrmSinrOffset(i,j,t,m) is the specific offset value used in rrmCorrAvgSinr calculation for high reliability. Please refer 5G_UP_ALG_3087_replaced([11130243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Please note that rrmSinrOffset value calculation shall not be interrupted while UE is configured with HR DRB.

The rule to calculate rrmSinrOffset(i,j,t,m) is:

[image-0][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

with

• i: Index of the UE;

• j: Index of the carrier;

• t: Slot the calculation relates to measured SINR

• m: Indicate which kind of grant is used in uplink, 0 means DG (Dynamic Grant), 1 means CG (Configured Grant).

• [image-1][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] is the long-term standard deviation of UL SINR based on SINR reports from PUSCH or SRS. It is maintained for all the UEs having at least one 1 HR DRB configured in UL. Please see below formula to calculate. Note that StdSinr(i,j,t,0) for DG and StdSinr(i,j,t,1) for CG are aligned with the L1 measurement reports corresponding to DG and L1 measurement reports corresponding to CG defined in 5G_UP_ALG_19441_replaced([11130836](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0ovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

• ullaOffset: offset value obtains from NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaSinrOffsetHR.

The rule to calculate [image-2][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.003.png[/image_path][/image-2] is:

[image-3][image_desc]The image is completely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.004.png[/image_path][/image-3]

[image-4][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image, a corrupted file, or a deliberate black image. There is no discernible content, text, or objects within it.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.005.png[/image_path][/image-4]

[image-5][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.006.png[/image_path][/image-5]

with

• While [image-6][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.007.png[/image_path][/image-6] shall use the next valid value of the SINR measurements ( rrmInstSinr[i,j,t]+MPR+rrmSinrCorrection[i,j,t]) in 5G_UP_ALG_11120_replaced([11130873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

• While [image-7][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.008.png[/image_path][/image-7]is the square of [image-8][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.009.png[/image_path][/image-8]

  * rdAvgSinrUlFilterConstHR is filter constant of the exponential filter (see 5G_UP_ALG_16859_replaced([11138658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krgj7fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
  * rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements(0) and rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements(1) are defined for the Number of SINR Measurement for DG and CG respectively. Please note that rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements(1) shall be valid only upon dgValidityTimer (5G_UP_ALG_18890_replaced([11130861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0pfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expiration or when the DG validity timer was not started (otherwise rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements(0) is valid) as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_19441_replaced([11130836](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0ovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [PR746507] For its initialization please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11120_replaced([11130873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_11125_replaced([11131117](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0rfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End PR746507]
  * rrmInstSinrHR(i,j,t) shall be the (rrmInstSinr[i,j,t]+MPR+rrmSinrCorrection[i,j,t]) defined in 5G_UP_ALG_11120_replaced([11130873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in which rrmInstSinrHR and rrmSinrCorrection are for CG or DG depending on slot t in which CG-PUSCH or DG-PUSCH is transmitted respectively.
  * Reset the exponential filters of [image-9][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.010.png[/image_path][/image-9], [image-10][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.011.png[/image_path][/image-10], [image-11][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7579.012.png[/image_path][/image-11] calculation when rank switching



If the lifetime of SINR report (rdSinrExpiryTimeHR - 5G_UP_ALG_16856_replaced([11138651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krgj6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is expired, the filter is reset

---

#### 3.8.3.1.0-3 Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation WB-SINR Averaging (ID: 11130714)

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11130719`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Averaging of the WB-SINR measurements

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11130725`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Overview

* * *

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11130742`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Upon reception of a valid short-term WB SINR measurement (see 5G_UP_ALG_3081_replaced([11131259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the L2 PS shall compute the average WB SINR, in the following steps.

 Pre-processing for instantaneous SINR inputs, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11115_replaced([11130748](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krANnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 L1 measurment report management (see 5G_UP_ALG_17024_replaced([11130831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0ofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 Exponential Filtering, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11120_replaced([11130873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Reset of Exponential Filter and recalculation of avg. SINR, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11125_replaced([11131117](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0rfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 [CB012535-A] Exponential Filtering to calculate the UE specific WB-SINR if NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE.actRimMitigationExtend is set to TRUE, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_27588_replaced([11131153](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Exponential Filtering to calculate the UL slot specific WB-SINR if NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE.actRimMitigationExtend is set to TRUE, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_27218_replaced([11131164](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbtPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB012535-A]

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11130748`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Pre-processing for instantaneous SINR inputs

* * *

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-2.0-8**  (ID: `13457599`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13457599: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation For the long-term averaging of the WB-SINR an exponential filter shall be used per UE i and per carrier j. The exponential filter shall be feed depending on the long-term rank either with rrmInstSinr[i,j,t] = ulPmiRank1Sinr[i,j,t] of the UlData_SrsReceiveRespPs or post SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). if number of layers is 1 or with rrmInstSinr[i,j,t]= ulRank2SinrSum[i,j,t] if number of layers = 2. **The mean SINR ulRank2SinrSum[i,j,t] is calculated either based on ulPmiRank2Sinr[0][1] of the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message or based on** post SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) depending on the setting of the R&D parameters rdSINRusedForRank2LA (see 5G_L2_1454_replaced([11186231](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274HefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_11068_replaced([11131303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). . Whenever the current long-term rank indicates a rank change in UL transmission the exponential filter shall be reset.****

For capture of ulPmiRank1Sinr or ulRank2SinrSum as well as for the definition of i, j, t, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3081_replaced([11131259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Editor’s note: After a reset, please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3079_replaced([11131196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For the case of SAg mode=on (see 5G_UP_ALG_18906_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and either 2x or 4x repetition responses, the ‘sinr’ parameter of the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message from all repetitions shall be applied to the exponential filter.

In the following two cases are distinguished the NSA case and the SA case. For the NSA case there are no changes compared to before while for the SA case a virtual PHR is defined and the SINR of the Msg3 is evaluated and modified.

In case of NSA the following requirements shall be executed: 

The SINR measurement coming from the Msg3 of the Random Access Procedure shall be skipped for the calculation of the average SINR because the UE could transmit the Msg3 with an increased transmission power and hence the SINR measurement is too optimistic. For the same reason, a PHR, which is received with the Msg3, shall be neglected as well in the UL link adaptation for SINR correction purposes.

As long as measurements are skipped, the parameter rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements shall not be increased and the Inner Loop Link Adaptation shall propose the default MCS (NRCELL.ullaIniMcs) for the transmissions in UL.

[Before CNI-129095-A]  
During the NSA contention resolution, the ATB shall restrict the PRB allocation to the number of PRBs defined by the R&D parameter rdForceNsaMsg5PrbNum (see 5G_L2_1276_replaced([11186165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273ga_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The skipping phase ends with a short delay after finalization of the Random Access Procedure. The short delay shall prevent timing issues in implementation.  
[CNI-129095-A]  
From the NSA contention resolution until the first applicable PHR/SINR information corresponding to the configured PCMAX is available, the ATB shall restrict the PRB allocation to the number of PRBs defined by the R&D parameter rdForceNsaMsg5PrbNum (see 5G_L2_1276_replaced([11186165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273ga_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The skipping phase ends with a short delay after finalization of the Random Access Procedure. The short delay shall prevent timing issues in implementation.  
[End CNI-129095-A]

In case of SA the following requirements shall be executed:

The SINR measurement coming from the Msg3 of the Random Access Procedure shall be taken into account for the exponential filter if the CRC is either OK or NOK. In case of DTX the measurement is skipped. The virtual PHR shall be also used but only for Msg5, please see 5G_UP_ALG_3096_replaced([11131242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for details which shall be allocated for the Rank1 UL transmission with the default MCS (NRCELL.ullaIniMcs). As long measurements are skipped, the parameter rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements shall not be increased. There shall be a short delay after finalization of the Random Access Procedure. The short delay shall prevent timing issues in implementation.

When any CFRA procedure is used (SA or NSA) with rdCfraMsg3LaEnabled activated (see 5G_L2_xxxx) and if the PHR is transmitted by the UE in the RA-Msg3 (especially if it reports power limitation), the PHR received is not filtered and the SINR of the RA-Msg3 is used in the link adaptation to determine the number of RBs and MCS for the next PUSCH allocation. In a live network, the beginning of the call is critical with only one uplink SINR measurement (from the RA-Msg3) and the PHR from the UE to estimate the UE radio conditions which must be not over estimated.

Editor’s note: An improved SINR evaluation is expected if the SINR parameters ulPmiRank1Sinr and ulRank2SinrSum are continuously averaged by separate exponential filter and the exponential filters are feed with all SINR parameters provided by L1. The improved SINR evaluation **is introduced to compute IRC Gain at L2 in order to sent it to L1 for RI/PMI evaluation, cf. 5G_UP_ALG_19664_replaced([11140073](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krrjD_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**.****

Editor’s note: An improved method to average [image-0][image_desc]ulRank2Sinr_lim[1][i, j, t][/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7591.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] and [image-1][image_desc]ulRank2Sinr_lim[2][i,j,t][/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7591.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3084_replaced([11131461](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In this requirement if the source is SRS, e.g. ulPmiRank1SINR then SRS PRB allocation is considered and powerOffsetSrsToPuschPerAllocatedRe computation (5G_UP_ALG_10497_replaced([11119432](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqKgE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall ensure comparable SINR measurement.

---

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11130854: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11130854: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11130854: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Without Configured Grant (CG) activated, the 5G-L2-PS selects the L1 measurement report in UlData_SrsReceiveRespPs or UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs as follows:  When rrmUlRiLongTerm is equal to 1 and the UE is configured with only one SRS port, the L1 measurement report used is available in the PUSCH response message. The SINR information used is only the sinr[0] value.  When rrmUlRiLongTerm is equal to 1 and the UE is configured with two SRS ports, the L1 measurement report used is available in the SRS response message as long as the message is decoded by the 5G-L1-UL (not DTX). The SINR information used only the ulPmiRank1Sinr value.  When rrmUlRiLongTerm is equal to 1, the UE is configured with two SRS ports and the SRS L1 measurement report is not more valid (no SRS report or SRS messages are DTX for a while ; see 5G_UP_ALG_3232_replaced([11140029](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krrjAvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_8305_replaced([11140053](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krrjC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_3238_replaced([11155604](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kswhFPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the L1 measurement report used is available in the PUSCH response message. The SINR information used is only the sinr[0] value.  When rrmUlRiLongTerm is equal to 2, the L1 measurement report used is available in the PUSCH response message, if the number of layers requested for the PUSCH transmission or retransmisison is equal to 2. In that case, two types of data are used according to the UE configuration type:  For coherent UE configuration, the SINR information used are the ulPmiRank2Sinr[0] and ulPmiRank2Sinr[1]. [Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] For non-coherent UE configuration, the SINR information used are the sinr[0] and sinr[1] [CB009363-OO-UPD003] For non-coherent UE configuration, the SINR information shall be the post SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for two layers. [End CB009363-OO-UPD003]  When rrmUlRiLongTerm is equal to 2 and the number of layers requested for the PUSCH retransmisison(s) is equal to 1, the 5G-L2-PS discards the L1 measurement report.  When rrmUlRiLongTerm is equal to 1 and the number of layers requested for the PUSCH retransmisison(s) is equal to 2, the L1 measurement report used is available in the PUSCH response message. [Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] The SINR information used is only the sinr[0] value.[CB009363-OO-UPD003] The SINR information used is the post SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of the first layer [End CB009363-OO-UPD003] When the CG is activated, periodic UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs messages are received from the lower layer. When the number of layers of the CG is equal to rrmUlRiLongTerm, the 5G-L2-PS uses the L1 measurement reports form CG PUSCH response message as it is done for the Dynamic Grants (DG) without CG (see above). If the number of layers configured for CG PUSCH transmissions is not equal to the rrmUlRiLongTerm, the 5G-L2-PS monitors the L1 measurement reports of dynamic grants while they are valid. The 5G-L2-PS starts or restarts a validity timer (5G_UP_ALG_18890_replaced([11130861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0pfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)): dgValidityTimer) at each time a DG (which is not corresponding to a CG retransmisison) is triggered. Until the DG validity timer expiration, the L1 measurement reports corresponding to CG are skipped and only the ones from DG are used. Upon dgValidityTimer expiration or when the the DG validity timer was not started , the 5G-L2-PS uses the CG L1 measurement reports until a new DG (including the initial transmisison of a CG modification) is triggered. When a L1 measurement report is received from a DG and which is not corresponding to the rrmAveSinrType, the rrmNumOfSinrMeasurments is reseted, leading to reset the IIR filter with the next rrmInstSinr value received. For the same reason, when the DG validity timer expires, the rrmNumOfSinrMeasurments is reseted only before the first L1 measurement report following the end of the timer. According to the L1 measurement report taken into account to determine the rrmInstSnr, the rrmAveSinrType is defined by the 5G-L2-PS. This parameter is used to decide if the new L1 measurement report could be used to compute the new rrmAveSinr. The L1 measurement report management is summarized in the figure hereafter. [CB009363-OO-UPD003] NOTE: The sinr[0] or sinr[1] in the following process shall be replaced by the post SINR after equalization(5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB009363-OO-UPD003] [image-0][image_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process related to L1 measurement source selection and reporting in a telecommunications system. The flowchart uses standard flowchart symbols like rectangles for processes, diamonds for decisions, and arrows for flow. The flowchart begins with "L1 measurement source" and proceeds through a series of decision points and processes. Key decision points include "Configured Grant activated (CG HARQ(s) used)?", "rrmULRTerm is not equal to cgRankUsed?", "dgValidity Timer expires or was never started and L1 measPpt = PUSCH(1)?", "First L1 measPpt after timer expiration?", "UE Type?", and "rrmULRTerm is equal to rrmAveSinr Type?". Processes include resetting measurement counters, calculating SINR values based on different conditions (e.g., "Coherent", "Non-Coherent", "UE Type?"), and selecting the L1 Measurement Report source based on various parameters like "rrmUILongTerm", "SPS report", "dgPuschReq", and "Layers". The flowchart branches out into different paths based on the outcomes of the decision points, ultimately leading to an "End" state. There are also several text boxes that provide explanations or definitions for certain conditions or selections. The text extracted from the image is as follows: L1 measurement source Configured Grant activated (CG HARQ(s) used)? Yes No rrmULRTerm is not equal to cgRankUsed? Yes Each Dynamic Grant (not CGreTx) (re)starts dgValidity Timer dgValidity Timer expires or was never started and L1 measPpt = PUSCH(1)? Yes No First L1 measPpt after timer expiration? Yes No Reset rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements (rrmAveSinr = Next L1 measPpt; rrmAveSinrType = Next L1 measPpt) Yes Coherent UE Type? No Non-Coherent rrminstSinr=f(ulPmiRank2Sinr[0],ulPmiRank2Sinr[1]) rrminstSinr=f(sinr[0],sinr[1]) One layer for CG PUSCH? Yes rrminstSinr=sinr[0] Yes L1 Measurement Report source selection: -rrmUILongTerm = Rank1 & 1 SPS port configured = src => PUSCH (DG [; CG discarded]) -rrmUILongTerm = Rank1 & Valid SRS report (2 SRS ports) src => SRS -rrmUILongTerm = Rank1 & No SRSreport (2 SPS ports) = src => PUSCH (DG [; CG discarded]) -rrmUILongTerm = Rank2 & dgPuschReq = 2 Layers = src => PUSCH (DG [; CG discarded]) -rrmUILongTerm = Rank2 & dgPuschReq = 1 Layer = src => PUSCH (DG [; CG] discarded) -rrmUILongTerm = Rank1 & dgPuschReq = 2 Layers = src => PUSCH (DG(ulPmiRank2Sinr[0], sinr[0)) [; CG discarded]) rrmAveSinrType = Rank2 rrmAveSinrType = Rank1 rrmAveSinr=f(rrmAveSinr,rrminstSinr) rrmAveSinrType= Rank1 or Rank2 End 1 2 3 L1 measPpt is PUSCH: \- in Rank2, \- in Rank1 when only 1 SPSport is configured or when SPS measPpt are missing (PUSCH fallback). Coherent Non-Coherent UE Type? rrminstSinr=f(ulPmiRank2Sinr[0], ulPmiRank2Sinr[1]) rrminstSinr=f(sinr[0],sinr[1]) rrmAveSinrType = Rank2 rrmAveSinr=f(rrmAveSinr,rrminstSinr) rrmAveSinrType = Rank2 End 3 2 L1 Measurement Report source selection: -rrmUILongTerm = Rank1 & 1 SRS port configured = src => PUSCH (DG & CG) -rrmUILongTerm = Rank1 & Valid SRSreport (2 SPS ports) = src => SRS -rrmUILongTerm = Rank1 & no SRS report (2 SPS ports) = src => PUSCH (DG & OG) -rrmUILongTerm = Rank2 & dgPuschReq = 2 Layers = src => PUSCH (DG & CG) -rrmUILongTerm = Rank2 & dgPuschReq = 1 Layer = src => PUSCH (DG discarded; OG used) -rrmUILongTerm = Rank1 & dgPuschReq = 2 Layers = src => PUSCH (DG discarded; OG used) PUSCH (2 layers) SPS L1 measPpt source? **3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11130861`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Validity timer of dyanmic grants when CG is activated (dgValidityTimer)

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11130868`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Defines the maximum duration, in ms, where a L1 measurement triggered by a dynamic grant (not a CG retransmission) remains valid.

Value range: 1...320

Default value: 40

Unit: milliseconds

Online modifiable: Yes

Step size: 1

Used in 5G_UP_ALG_19441_replaced([11130836](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0ovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_15846_replaced([11130560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krANk_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 12697967: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 12697967: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 12697967: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The number of layers for UL transmissions is restricted permanently to a single layer for a UE that supports due to its UE capabilities neither Rank1 transmissions nor Rank2 transmissions but only singleTx mode transmissions (see 5G_UP_ALG_11068_replaced([11131303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Hence, the exponential filter is for such an UE continuously feed by post SINR after equalization(5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (rrmInstSinr[i,j,t] = sinr[i,j,t]) and the reset of the exponential filter due to a rank change is not required. If NIDD: NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is true AND NIDD: NRCELL.ulMuMimoParaSet.ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch =0 (MU-SINR estimation): For the UEs whose data transmissions are with UL MU-MIMO, L2PS shall feed the post SU-SINR to the exponent filter according to the algorithm refer to 5G_UP_ALG_18098_replaced([11148747](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksKrOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). End The exponential filter shall calculate the average SINR in the dB domain and shall be compliant to the following equation. [image-0][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] For an FR1 Ul inter-band CA UE which is in power split mode according to 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), since UE prioritizes to distribute TX power to PUSCH on Pcell, the average SINR shall be calculated as the below on SCell in Ul overlapping slots: if there is no parallel scheduling on PCell in the Ul overlapping slot Follow the rrmAvgSinrUl calculation above; else [image-1][image_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] [image-2][image_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.003.png[/image_path][/image-2] [image-3][image_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.004.png[/image_path][/image-3] [image-4][image_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.005.png[/image_path][/image-4] Follow the rrmAvgSinrUl calculation above; else [image-5][image_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.006.png[/image_path][/image-5] [image-6][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.007.png[/image_path][/image-6] endif else rrmInstSinr(i,SCell,t) shall be discarded; endif endif with: i: Index of the UE j: Index of the carrier t: Time (UL slot) the SINR is measured rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements: Number of received WB-SINR measurements since start of averaging - initialized to 1 when 1st WB-SINR measurement is processed after setup or FR1 SCell activation, or when first HR(High Reliability) DRB is setup, resumption after outdated SINR measurements and rank change of the UL transmission (long term rank – see 5G_UP_ALG_3224_replaced([11139906](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) rdAvgSinrUlFilterConst: Filter constant of the exponential filter (see 5G_L2_1027_replaced([11185023](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27u9jfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) rrmAvgSinrUl: Average WB-SINR in UL (dB) rrmInstSinr: Instantaneous WB-SINR of the UL transmission (dB). Either ulPmiRank1Sinr or ulRank2SinrSum depending on the applied rank in UL transmission or sinr in single TX mode (see 5G_UP_ALG_11068_replaced([11131303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). rrmSinrCorrection: Correction factor of the SINR measurements (see 5G_UP_ALG_9935_replaced([11130229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mgvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) MPR: Maximum Power Reduction for below 256QAM including QPSK, 16QAM, 64QAM DeltaMPR256QAM: Delta Maximum Power Reduction between 256QAM and below 256QAM especially 64QAM rrmPmaxBoost: The additional Pmax due to power boosting [image-7][image_desc]The image is entirely black. There is no discernible content, text, or patterns within the image.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.008.png[/image_path][/image-7]refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and the unit is mW. [image-8][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.009.png[/image_path][/image-8]and [image-9][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.010.png[/image_path][/image-9] refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10873_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10873_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [image-10][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.011.png[/image_path][/image-10] is the granted PRBs for the UL transmission. convertToMw is to convert dBm to mW. convertToDbm is to convert mW to dBm. tPHR: Time (UL slot) the PHR is received last. rrmNumPuschPrb[i,SCell,tPHR]: Number of PUSCH PRBs on SCell contributing to the UL transmission with PHR. rrmMaxNumPuschPrb: Number of PRBs available for PUSCH in the particular bandwidth system. [image-11][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.012.png[/image_path][/image-11]: [image-12][image_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7603.013.png[/image_path][/image-12]in the PHR report for SCell. The parameter rrmPmaxBoost is defined as follows: if (SINR is measured from PUSCH) and (R16 DMRS is used according to 5G_UP_ALG_22733_replaced([11140870](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krv0ePvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and (UE is capable of power boosting according to 5G_UP_ALG_22789_replaced([11140882](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krv0e_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and (UE is power limited according to 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) rrmPmaxBoost = rdPmaxBoost (see 5G_UP_ALG_22793_replaced([11138810](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krhyDPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), else rrmPmaxBoost = 0 endif The parameter DeltaMPR256QAM is defined as follows: · If the R&D parameter rdMprQam256ActiveFddTdd (see 5G_L2_3347_replaced([11184869](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27uWcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is enabled for current technology and instantaneous SINR measurement ulPmiRank1Sinr or ulRank2SinrSum of the instantaneous SINR measurements ulPmiRank2Sinr are provided by the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message and If UE is power limited (defined by 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRCELL.actUl256Qam is enabled and UE is in 256QAM mode (then UE is scheduled with Table 5.1.3.1-2 for 256QAM) and currentMCS is MCS20 <= MCS <= MCS27 or MCS31 If UE is not configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA DeltaMPR256QAM = 3dB (Note that there is 3dB difference between 256QAM and below 256QAM especially 64QAM in 3GPPTS38.101-1 section 6.2.2) else if UE is configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA if SCell with intra-band contiguous UL CA is deactivated or transmission buffer in UL is not split between PCell and SCell (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [Before PR840715] DeltaMPR256QAM = 3dB for inner RB allocation for contiguous RB allocation and CA bandwidth class B. DeltaMPR256QAM = 2dB for outer RB allocation for contiguous RB allocation and CA bandwidth class B. DeltaMPR256QAM = 2dB for inner RB allocation for contiguous RB allocation and CA bandwidth class C. DeltaMPR256QAM = 0 in all other cases. note: see 3GPP TS38.101-1 section 6.2A.2 for the calculation rule to determine it's inner RB allocation or outer RB allocation for contiguous RB allocation and 3GPP TS38.101-1 section 5.3A.5 for CA bandwidth class. [PR840715] DeltaMPR256QAM = 3dB [End PR840715] else DeltaMPR256QAM = 0 endif endif else DeltaMPR256QAM = 0dB endif The parameter MPR is defined as follows: If UE is not configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA  If the R&D parameter rdMprActive (see 5G_L2_1371_replaced([11185224](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wysPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1 or to 2 and for the deployment defined by rdMprActiveFddTdd and UE is power limited (defined by 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) o MPR = rdMprFdd (see 5G_L2_1375_replaced([11185245](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if the PUSCH allocation is greater than the bandwidth specific inner RB allocation in FDD deployment o MPR = rdMprTddFr1 (see 5G_L2_1376_replaced([11185252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if the PUSCH allocation is greater than the bandwidth specific inner RB allocation in TDD FR1 deployment o MPR = 0 in all other cases  If the R&D parameter rdMprActive is set to 0 or if the gNB is configured for the bands defined with R&D parameter rdMprDisableBandsFr1 (see 5G_L2_3622_replaced([11185218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wLr_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or if the gNB is setup for a DSS configuration (NRCELL.lteNrDssMode != 0). o MPR is always 0 else if UE is configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA * if (SCell with intra-band contiguous UL CA is deactivated or transmission buffer in UL is not split between PCell and SCell (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and UE is power limited (defined by 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) o MPR = rdMprFr1CCAConRbB (see 5G_UP_ALG_28222_replaced([11138943](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjAKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for CA bandwidth class B, if the PUSCH allocation is outer RB allocation for contiguous RB allocation. o MPR = rdMprFr1CCAConRbC (see 5G_UP_ALG_28224_replaced([11138954](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjALPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for CA bandwidth class C, if the PUSCH allocation is outer RB allocation for contiguous RB allocation. o MPR = 0 in all other cases. * else o MPR = 0 * endif endif For UE configured with FR1 UL inter-band CA with uplink assigned to two bands, respective DeltaMPR256QAM and MPR values shall be applied on each of both UL serving cells according to 38.101 section 6.2A. The instantaneous SINR parameter rrmInstSinr, which is feed into the exponential filter, shall be clipped in the range between rdInstSinrMin dB (5G_L2_1214_replaced([11185120](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27vkpPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdInstSinrMax dB (5G_L2_1215_replaced([11185125](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27vkpfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131146: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131146: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131146: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131146: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131146: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131146: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131146: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131146: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Whenever the UE doesn’t transmit any data in UL for a certain period, and hence the physical layer doesn’t forward any WB-SINR measurement, the average WB-SINR shall be obsolete and the exponential filter shall be reset with the next predicted WB-SINR measurement available after the pause. The time after that the exponential filter shall be reset is defined by the R&D parameter rdSinrExpiryTime (see 5G_L2_1029_replaced([11186254](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for basic reliability, and rdSinrExpiryTimeHR (see 5G_UP_ALG_16856_replaced([11138651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krgj6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for high reliability. The rdSinrExpiryTime shall be started if UE is in BR (Basic Reliability) mode or the rdSinrExpiryTimeHR shall be started if UE is in HR (High Reliability) mode. To shorten the transient phase for the evaluation of the average WB-SINR, the exponential filter shall use for the first iterations after setup, [PR746507]or when first HR(High Reliability) DRB is setup[End PR746507], resumption after outdated SINR measurements, and rank change the number of captured WB-SINR measurements (rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements) instead of the filter constant. rrmNumOfSinrMeasurements shall be set to 1 after occurrence of one of the listed events. The reset of the exponential filter consists to overwrite the rrmAvgSinr by the rrmInstSinr received. if the reset is not triggered when the L1 measurement is received, the last computed rrmAvgSinr is kept and is considered as a rank 1 SINR (if it is expected to have a transmission in rank2, an additional offset is computed according to the MCS difference between rank1 and rank2 (see 5G_UP_ALG_3079_replaced([11131196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_10292_replaced([11131211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_15513_replaced([11131225](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))). [image-0][image_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process for recalculating the average SINR (Signal-to-Interference-plus-Noise Ratio). The flowchart begins with a "Start" oval labeled "Recalculation of average SINR". From there, a diamond-shaped decision point asks "rdSinrExpiryTime expired". If the answer is "yes" (implied by the flow), the process moves to a rectangular box labeled "Initialize exponential filter (rrmAvgSinr)". If the answer is "no" (implied by the flow), the process moves to a rectangular box labeled "(re)start rdSinrExpiryTime". After either the initialization or the restart of rdSinrExpiryTime, the process proceeds to a rectangular box labeled "Calculate and store average SINR (rmAvgSinr)". Finally, the flowchart concludes with an "End" oval labeled "Recalculation of average SINR". There is a separate rectangular box on the right side of the flowchart, labeled "Initialize exponential filter (rrmAvgSinr)", which appears to be a parallel or alternative path to the main flow, or perhaps an explanation of what happens when the expiry time is reached. However, the arrows do not clearly connect it to the main flow in a standard way. It's possible this box is meant to be a separate process or a detail of the initialization step.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7607.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] Recalculation of the average SINR File: Drawings for 5GC000517_5GC001796_ DLLA_and_ULLA.vsdx Folder: If PUSCH is received over 4 spatial streams in a given UL subcell (5G_UP_8362_replaced([11388556](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufKxMfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and number of subcells is two (5G_UP_2470_replaced([11389618](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufPCk_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),UE's status switched from MU to initial transmission traffic SU status, the average WB-SINR shall be obsolete and the exponential filter shall be reset to instantaneous SU-SINR.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `11131153`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Exponential Filtering to calculate the UE specific WB-SINR

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11131158`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If the NIDD parameter NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE.actRimMitigationExtend is set to TRUE, the gNB-DU shall calculate continuously the UE specific average WB-SINR (5G_UP_ALG_11120_replaced([11130873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) independently on the status of the RIM UL mitigation extension (see 5G_UP_ALG_27175_replaced([11163444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktZaQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). All WB-SINR measurements received from all UL transmissions shall be considered for the calculation of the UE specific average WB-SINR. The so calculated UE specific average WB-SINR is used for the calculation of the corrected average WB-SINR (see 5G_UP_ALG_3087_replaced([11130243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if RIM UL mitigation (see 5G_UP_ALG_27175_replaced([11163444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktZaQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is not triggered. If RIM UL mitigation is triggered the UE specific average WB-SINR isn’t any longer the basis for the calculation of the corrected average WB-SINR but is still the input parameter for the existing RRM features DFT-S-OFDM (5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), Configured Grant Type 2 (5G_UP_ALG_14572_replaced([11172720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuN5oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), Carrier Aggregation (5G_UP_ALG_2660_replaced([11120231](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqOxivvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and Closed Loop Power Control (5G_UP_ALG_2633_replaced([11119107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqIq4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), which evaluate all the UE’s average WB-SINR.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `11131164`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Exponential Filtering to calculate the UL slot specific WB-SINR

---

**3.8.3.1.0-3.0-1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11131169`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The gNB-DU shall support in addition to the UE specific exponential filter (see 5G_UP_ALG_27588_replaced([11131153](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) two UL slot specific exponential filters if the NIDD parameter NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE.actRimMitigationExtend is set to TRUE. These UL slot specific exponential filters shall average continuously the short-term WB-SINR parameters (see 5G_UP_ALG_27221_replaced([11131426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), which belong to the 1st UL slot and the 2nd UL slot after S slot. With the so-calculated UL slot specific average WB-SINR parameters the gNB-DU is in the position to evaluate the slot specific corrected average SINR parameters (see 5G_UP_ALG_3087_replaced([11130243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if RIM UL mitigation (see 5G_UP_ALG_27175_replaced([11163444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktZaQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is triggered. Based on the slot specific corrected average SINR parameters the gNB-DU shall evaluate the proposed MCS (see 5G_UP_ALG_19826_replaced([11131511](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) separately for the 1st UL slot and the 2nd UL slot if RIM UL mitigation (see 5G_UP_ALG_27175_replaced([11163444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktZaQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is triggered. These exponential filters shall average the slot specific short-term WB-SINR parameters concurrently to the UE specific exponential filter (see 5G_UP_ALG_27588_replaced([11131153](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Feature set, functionality and the initialization procedure of the UL slot specific exponential filter shall be compliant to the UE specific exponential filter.

---

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation [CB0013388-C]If NRCELL.actUlCgType2= TRUE,[CB0013388-C] for a UE with configured grant (CG) type2 in CG-Configured state, an update in rrmCorrAvgSinr (see 5G_UP_ALG_3073_replaced([11130124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_dvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall trigger the ‘SINR update event’ event that shall evaluate the opportunity of further triggering the CG activation (see 5G_UP_ALG_15121_replaced([11173004](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPu2fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131205: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131205: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131205: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Depending on the R&D parameter rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition (see 5G_L2_1456_replaced([11186241](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274He_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) different methods shall be implemented for the temporarily used MCS during the transient phase until the first SINR parameter after rank change from Rank1 to Rank2 as well as from Rank2 to Rank1 is available.

If rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition is set to 0 the MCS, which shall be applied during the transient phase, shall have approximately the same TBS for rank changes from Rank1 to Rank2 and is defined by the following mapping tables.

Corresponding MCS for the rank changes from Rank1 to Rank2

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a table with two columns, "Rank1" and "Rank2". The rest of the table is filled with black. There is no other discernible content in the image.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7617.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

Corresponding MCS for the rank changes from Rank2 to Rank1:

rank2 MCS value mapped as rank1 MCS value.

The MCSes MCS10 and MCS17 are not supported in the gNB’s implementation for the 64QAM MCS index table and hence are not considered in the mapping tables.

If rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition is set to 1 the MCS, which shall be applied during the transient phase corresponds for the time the rank change from Rank1 to Rank2 to the latest SINR of ulData_SrsReceiveRespPs message(ulPmiRank2Sinr). If the rank changes from Rank2 to Rank1 the MCS shall correspond to the latest SINR of ulData_PuschReceiveRespPs message(ulPmiRank1Sinr).

ulPmiRank2Sinr from ulData_SrsReceiveRespPs message shall be averaged with the method defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3081_replaced([11131259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The transient phase ends with the first received SINR parameter corresponding to the UL transmission after rank change. With reception of this SINR parameter the exponential filter shall be reset and initialized as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3078_replaced([11130719](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krANl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.8.3.1.0-5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11131216`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Depending on the R&D parameter rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition (see 5G_L2_1456_replaced([11186241](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274He_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) different methods shall be implemented for the temporarily used MCS for 256QAM table during the transient phase until the first SINR parameter after rank change from Rank1 to Rank2 as well as from Rank2 to Rank1 is available.

If rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition is set to 0 the MCS, which shall be applied during the transient phase, shall have approximately the same TBS for rank changes from Rank1 to Rank2 and is defined by the following mapping tables.

---|---  
Rank1 | Rank2  
MCS0 | MCS0

MCS5 | MCS2  
MCS6 | MCS2

MCS22 | MCS11  
MCS23 | MCS12  
MCS24 | MCS12  
MCS25 | MCS13  
MCS26 | MCS13  
MCS27 | MCS14  
  
Corresponding MCS for the rank changes from Rank2 to Rank1

rank2 MCS value mapped as rank1 MCS value.

If rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition is set to 1 the MCS, which shall be applied during the transient phase corresponds for the time the rank change from Rank1 to Rank2 to the latest SINR of ulData_SrsReceiveRespPs message(ulPmiRank2Sinr). If the rank changes from Rank2 to Rank1 the MCS shall correspond to the latest SINR of ulData_PuschReceiveRespPs message(ulPmiRank1Sinr).

ulPmiRank2Sinr from ulData_SrsReceiveRespPs message shall be averaged with the method defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3081_replaced([11131259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The transient phase ends with the first received SINR parameter corresponding to the UL transmission after rank change. With reception of this SINR parameter the exponential filter shall be reset and initialized as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3078_replaced([11130719](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krANl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**3.8.3.1.0-5.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11131228`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Depending on the R&D parameter rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition (see 5G_L2_1456_replaced([11186241](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274He_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) different methods shall be implemented for the temporarily used MCS during the transient phase until the first SINR parameter after rank change from Rank1 to Rank2 as well as from Rank2 to Rank1 is available.

If rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition is set to 0 the MCS, which shall be applied during the transient phase, shall have approximately the same TBS for rank changes from Rank1 to Rank2 and is defined by the following mapping tables.

Corresponding MCS for the rank changes from Rank1 to Rank2

|   
---|---  
Rank1 | Rank2  
MCS0 | MCS0  
MCS1 | MCS0  
MCS2 | MCS0  
MCS3 | MCS1  
MCS4 | MCS1  
MCS5 | MCS2  
MCS6 | MCS3  
MCS7 | MCS4  
MCS8 | MCS5  
MCS9 | MCS7  
MCS10 | MCS7  
MCS11 | MCS8  
MCS12 | MCS9  
MCS13 | MCS10  
MCS14 | MCS10  
MCS15 | MCS11  
MCS16 | MCS11  
MCS17 | MCS12  
MCS18 | MCS13  
MCS19 | MCS14  
MCS20 | MCS15  
MCS21 | MCS15  
MCS22 | MCS16  
MCS23 | MCS17  
MCS24 | MCS18  
MCS25 | MCS18  
MCS26 | MCS19  
MCS27 | MCS19  
MCS28 | MCS20  
  
Corresponding MCS for the rank changes from Rank2 to Rank1:

rank2 MCS value mapped as rank1 MCS value.

If rdMCSselectionAtRankTransition is set to 1 the MCS, which shall be applied during the transient phase corresponds for the time the rank change from Rank1 to Rank2 to the latest SINR of ulData_SrsReceiveRespPs message(ulPmiRank2Sinr). If the rank changes from Rank2 to Rank1 the MCS shall correspond to the latest SINR of ulData_PuschReceiveRespPs message(ulPmiRank1Sinr).

ulPmiRank2Sinr from ulData_SrsReceiveRespPs message shall be averaged with the method defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3081_replaced([11131259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The transient phase ends with the first received SINR parameter corresponding to the UL transmission after rank change. With reception of this SINR parameter the exponential filter shall be reset and initialized as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3078_replaced([11130719](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krANl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation **MCS for UL-DCCH[RRC setup complete]**

**3.8.3.1.0-5.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11131242`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation ULLA in case of Msg5 due to Pronto CAS-345904-W5D0

---

**3.8.3.1.0-5.0-4.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `12526691`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation In case of SA for the [Before 04564654] Msg 5[04564654] UL-DCCH[RRC Setup complete] [End 04564654], following 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be run normally with the following constraints:

 The initial state of the timer (SINR expiry) shall be NOT ‘expired’.

 Assumption is that the UE is in power limitation for Msg3 and Msg5 for allocation up to the requested size of Msg5 (16 PRB are sufficient, 24 PRBs are not needed to transfer 39 Byte with 10 data symbols and MCS0).

 The PHR of Message 3 shall be set virtually to 0. The virtual PHR Msg5 = PHR Msg3 - ROUNDDOWN(10*log10(3PRB/16PRB)) = -8; This virtual PHR needs to be considered in L2-PS only for Msg5.

 rrmMaxNumPrb for Msg5 = max(6 PRB; rrmMaxNumPrb) therefore the minimum allocation shall have 6 PRBs

 The link adaptation /ATB shall not be reset after reception of Msg5 and continues with the evaluation of the UL.

 Only Rank1 UL transmissions with the default MCS (NRCELL.ullaIniMcs) shall be allocated. <= this is not aligned to the current behavior...

#### 3.8.3.1.0-6 Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation WB-SINR Measurement (ID: 11131253)

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11131259`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Short-term WB-SINR measurements

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11131264`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Overview

* * *

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11131274`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The gNB shall support the short term WB-SINR processing, as following:

\- Inputs from PUSCH and SRS measurements, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11066_replaced([11131279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- Working modes, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11068_replaced([11131303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- Validity, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11071_replaced([11131325](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- Enhanced Link Adaptation, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11073_replaced([11131337](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- SINR Processing, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11075_replaced([11131360](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp2PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- [CB012535-A] Provisioning of the short-term WB-SINR measurement to calculate the UE specific and UL slot specific WB-SINR if NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE.actRimMitigationExtend is set to TRUE, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_27221_replaced([11131426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB012535-A]

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11131279`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Inputs from PUSCH and SRS measurements

* * *

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11131297`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The physical layer provides two different kinds of SINR measurements (see 5GMax – 5G New Radio Algorithm Specification; chapter 2.8 and 5G_UP_ALG_7420_replaced([11109458](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko4GrPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). On the one hand, SINR measurements corresponding to rank1 UL transmissions (ulPmiRank1Sinr) and on the other hand SINR measurements, which provide the conditions related to rank2 UL transmissions (ulPmiRank2Sinr).

Additionally, the physical layer provides the SINR measurement [Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] ‘sinr’ [CB009363-OO-UPD003] post SINR after equalization(5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009363-OO-UPD003] used by Link adaptation for singleTx transmissions (UE single Tx capable or the UE is configured with 2 SRS ports and ulSinrSourceForRank1SUMimo is set to PUSCH and long term Rank is set to 1 or the UE (2 SRS ports capable) is configured with only one SRS port).

The SINR measurements for rank1 and rank2 are provided by 5G-L1-UL independent if a rank1 or a rank2 transmission is pending and the SINR measurements represent the prediction of the SINR requested for the pending UL transmission. Furthermore, the SINR measurements base on different sources. On the one hand on PUSCH transmissions (UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs see 5G_UP_ALG_1701_replaced([11108899](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kowx7_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2640_replaced([11119228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqJR8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and on the other hand on SRS (UlData_SrsReceiveRespPs see 5G_UP_ALG_1701_replaced([11108899](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kowx7_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2640_replaced([11119228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqJR8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The SINR measurements coming from UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message are valid if the received PUSCH has been transmitted on 2-layers, otherwise SINR measurements coming from UlData_SRSReceiveRespPs message are used. Only the valid SINR parameters from the messages UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs and UlData_SRSReceiveRespPs shall be used for the SINR evaluation (until the fallback is triggered when there is no SRS measurements). For the evaluation of the required SINR, which is the basis for the MCS selection, only a subset of the available SINR measurements are relevant. Further details are defined in 5G_UP_ALG_11068_replaced([11131303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

At the time the MCS selection is called, the long-term Rank value is passed to the link adaptation, too. This ltRank is the result of a long-term rank evaluation which is done outside the scope of the MCS selection. UL link adaptation stores this ltRank to indicate the rank for which the exponential SINR filter is based on. Furthermore, the UL link adaptation shall evaluate either ulPmiRank1Sinr if the current ltRank corresponds to rank 1 or ulPmiRank2Sinr if the current ltRank corresponds to rank 2 (see 5G_UP_ALG_11068_replaced([11131303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For a UE, which supports due its UE capability only a single layer transmission using one physical antenna (singleTx – see 5G_UP_ALG_5062_replaced([11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) the average wideband SINR measurement shall be evaluated based on the [Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] ‘sinr’ parameter provided by the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message [CB009363-OO-UPD003] post SINR after equalization(5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009363-OO-UPD003] (see 5G_UP_ALG_1701_replaced([11108899](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kowx7_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2640_replaced([11119228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqJR8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Editor’s note: In UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs and UlData_SrsReceiveRespPs, value INVALID is not specified for ulPmiRankXSinr (X in {1,2}), but can be derived by checking the corresponding ulPmiRankX

 ulPmiRank1 INVALID (specified as 255) -> ulPmiRank1Sinr INVALID

 ulPmiRank2 INVALID (specified as 255) -> ulPmiRank2Sinr INVALID

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11131303`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Working modes

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11131319`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The following set of SINR measurements shall be used for the evaluation of the required SINR.

 Depending on the NIDD parameter NRCELL.ulSinrSourceForRank1SUMimo the average SINR rrmAvgSinrUl[i,j,t] of Rank1 transmissions is calculated

 either by the SINR parameter ulPmiRank1Sinr of the ulData_SrsReceiveRespPs message or the [Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] ‘sinr’ parameter of the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message [CB009363-OO-UPD003] post SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009363-OO-UPD003] if ulPmiRank1Sinr from SRS is DTX OR from SRS in special slots where remote interference is detected (see 5G_UP_ALG_9459_replaced([11163403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktYzOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR from periodic SRS during remote interference reference signal detection (see 5G_UP_ALG_13520_replaced([11162042](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktW-APvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (NRCELL.ulSinrSourceForRank1SuMimo=0)

 or [Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] the ‘sinr’ parameter of the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message [CB009363-OO-UPD003] post SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009363-OO-UPD003] (NRCELL.ulSinrSourceForRank1SuMimo=1)

Depending on the R&D parameter rdSINRusedForRank2LA (see 5G_L2_1454_replaced([11186231](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274HefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) the average SINR rrmAvgSinrUl[i,j,t] of Rank2 transmissions is calculated

 either by the SINR parameter ulPmiRank2Sinr[0][1] of the ulData_PuschReceiveRespPs message if rdSINRusedForRank2LA is set to 0 or rdSINRusedForRank2LA is set to 2 and the UE is a coherent UE

 or the [Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] SINR parameter ‘sinr[0][1]’ of the ulData_PuschReceiveRespPs message [CB009363-OO-UPD003] post SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009363-OO-UPD003] if rdSINRusedForRank2LA is set to 1 or rdSINRusedForRank2LA is set to 2 and the UE is a non-coherent UE

 The average SINR of a singleTx UE is evaluated by means of [Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] the ‘sinr’ parameter provided by the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message [CB009363-OO-UPD003] post SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009363-OO-UPD003] if the parameter ‘maxNumOfUlLayer’ provided by the PsUser_UserSetupReq message is set to 1. Further check are not needed for the detection of the singleTx mode.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11131325`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Validaty: HARQ, DTX, Beam Fallback

* * *

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11131332`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The Inner Loop Link Adaptation shall capture these SINR measurements in each case for initial transmissions and HARQ retransmissions.

The received SINR parameter shall be skipped if the L1 provides a DTX indication with the corresponding receive response message

 If ulData_SrsReceiveRespPs(dtx) = 1 -> SrsReceiveRespPs(ulPmiRank1Sinr) shall be skipped

 If UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs(dtx) = 1 -> PuschReceiveRespPs(ulPmiRank2Sinr) / PuschReceiveRespPs(sinr) shall be skipped

A skipped SINR parameter shall be considered as a not available SINR parameter.

The received SINR shall be skipped if appliedUlBeamFallback == TRUE (5G_UP_ALG_1888_replaced([11111451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpNd3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the beam probing procedure (see 5G_UP_ALG_2041_replaced([11112416](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZr_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or the beam re-probing procedure (see 5G_UP_ALG_2051_replaced([11112493](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpWAwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is performed.

The received SINR parameter shall be skipped if appliedUlBeamSweeping == TRUE (5G_UP_ALG_1888_replaced([11111451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpNd3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the beam sweeping procedure related to PUSCH (see 5G_UP_ALG_2062_replaced([11112532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpWn0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is indicated.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11131337`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Enhanced LA

* * *

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-5.0-4**  (ID: `13480109`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If NIDD parameter NRBTS.actEnhancedLinkAdaptation is set to 1:

The number of consecutively received SrsReceiveRespPs messages indicated with DTX shall be counted. Each non-DTX of SrsReceiveRespPs resets the counter to null **if the SRS SINR is equal or greater than rdSrsNonDtxMinPower (see 5G_L2_1428_replaced([11186208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hc_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). After the threshold of rdSrsDtxNum (see 5G_L2_1203_replaced([11185114](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27vko_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is reached, all following received PuschReceiveRespPs messages shall be used for SINR measurements of Rank1 (post SINR after equalization(5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) until a series of consecutively SrsReceiveRespPs messages with a SRS SINR equal or greater than rdSrsNonDtxMinPower (see 5G_L2_1428_replaced([11186208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hc_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and non-DTX indication is received. The number of consecutively SrsReceiveRespPs messages required to leave the fall back state is defined by the R&D parameter rdSrsNonDtxNum (see 5G_L2_1427_replaced([11186202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274HcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

[PR866958-26R2] If the R&D parameter rdActSrsSinrFallback (see [13480147](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4HXlSD2KEfG0jPRAdLhzvA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is set to TRUE, the gNB-DU shall select immediately the post SINR after equalization ([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as SINR measurements of Rank1 if the SINR from SRS is not DTXed and:

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in black text on a white background. The equation is: $SINR_{post-equalized} \geq SINR_{SRS} + rdSrsSinrOffsetRank1$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-04211543.png[/image_path][/image-0]

with

SINRpost-equalized: post SINR after equalization  
SINRSRS: SINR of the SrsReceiveRespPs message  
rdSrsSinrOffsetRank1: R&D parameter defined in [13480137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_36lYYj2IEfG0jPRAdLhzvA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

If the gNB-DU selects the post-equalized SINR as consequence of the SINR comparison, the above specified DTX evaluation of the SRS SINR shall be paused. The gNB-DU shall resume the legacy DTX evaluation of the SRS SINR as defined above if

[image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality. The inequality is written in italicized text and reads: $SINR_{post-equalized} < SINR_{SRS} + rdSrsSinrOffsetRank1$.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/img-04211544.png[/image_path][/image-1]

and the gNB-DU shall reset the DTX counter. [End PR866958-26R2]

If the PuschReceiveRespPs message was used for the SINR measurement, the SINR value is considered as an available SINR parameter and the corresponding time supervision shall be reset (rdSinrExpiryTime, see 5G_L2_1029_replaced([11186254](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **for basic reliability and (rdSinrExpiryTimeHR, see 5G_UP_ALG_16856_replaced([11138651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krgj6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for high reliability.**

Note that the expiry of rdSinrExpiryTime or rdSinrExpiryTimeHR may or may not occur before the threshold of rdSrsDtxNum is reached.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `11131360`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation SINR processing

* * *
