**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-6.0-5**  (ID: `13462333`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Enhanced LA

* * *

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-6.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `13462336`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If NIDD parameter NRBTS.actEnhancedLinkAdaptation is set to 1:

The number of consecutively received SrsReceiveRespPs messages indicated with DTX shall be counted. Each non-DTX of SrsReceiveRespPs resets the counter to null if the SRS SINR is equal or greater than rdSrsNonDtxMinPower (see 5G_L2_1428_replaced([11186208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hc_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). After the threshold of rdSrsDtxNum (see 5G_L2_1203_replaced([11185114](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27vko_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is reached, all following received PuschReceiveRespPs messages shall be used for SINR measurements of Rank1 ([Before CB009363-OO-UPD003] parameter ‘sinr’ [CB009363-OO-UPD003] post SINR after equalization(5G_UP_ALG_25392_replaced([11131411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009363-OO-UPD003]) until a serie of consecutively SrsReceiveRespPs messages with a SRS SINR equal or greater than rdSrsNonDtxMinPower (see 5G_L2_1428_replaced([11186208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hc_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and non-DTX indication is received. The number of consecutively SrsReceiveRespPs messages required to leave the fall back state is defined by the R&D parameter rdSrsNonDtxNum (see 5G_L2_1427_replaced([11186202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274HcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). If the PuschReceiveRespPs message was used for the SINR measurement, the SINR value is considered as an available SINR parameter and the corresponding time supervision shall be reset (rdSinrExpiryTime, see 5G_L2_1029_replaced([11186254](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for basic reliability and (rdSinrExpiryTimeHR, see 5G_UP_ALG_16856_replaced([11138651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krgj6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for high reliability.

Note that the expiry of rdSinrExpiryTime or rdSinrExpiryTimeHR may or may not occur before the threshold of rdSrsDtxNum is reached.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `11131411`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Post SINR after equalization usage in L2RT

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11131421`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If (NRCELL.actUlMuMimo == FALSE) OR (NRCELL.actUlMuMimo == TRUE) AND (NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming == 4),

\- the SINR information is post SU-SINR after equalization (5G_UP_ALG_21967_replaced([11108937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koxY_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is true && NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 8 [CB010708-C] or 16 [End CB010708-C] :

\- For the UEs with SU-MIMO traffic, the SINR information is the post SU-SINR after equalization(5G_UP_ALG_21967_replaced([11108937](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koxY_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

\- For the UEs with MU-MIMO traffic, the SINR information refer to 5G_UP_ALG_24987_replaced([11149165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksMgYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `11131426`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Provisioning of the short-term WB-SINR measurement to calculate the UE specific and UL slot specific WB-SINR

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11131434`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If the NIDD parameter NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE.actRimMitigationExtend is set to TRUE, the gNB-DU shall forward all short-term WB-SINR measurements to the exponential filter, which calculates the UE specific WB-SINR (5G_UP_ALG_27588_replaced([11131153](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Additionally, the gNB-DU shall forward the short-term WB-SINR measurement belonging to the 1st UL slot after the S slot to the exponential filter, which calculates the 1st UL slot’s WB-SINR. Similarly, the gNB-DU shall forward the short-term WB-SINR measurement belonging to the 2nd UL slot after the S slot to the exponential filter, which calculates the 2nd UL slot’s WB-SINR. The UL slot specific exponential filters are defined by 5G_UP_ALG_27218_replaced([11131164](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krBbtPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11131439`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Short-term WB-SINR measurements – Linear mean of Rank2 SINR parameter

---

**3.8.3.1.0-6.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11131455`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131455: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation [CNI-88099-AA] Since the ulRank2Sinr measurement is provided separately for each layer the sum of these two SINR measurements shall be calculated in a first step for pending rank2 transmissions. For this purpose, the sum of the measurements uRank2SinrSum shall be calculated based on the following equation if the R&D parameter rdAverageBetween2LayersFromPusch (see 5G_L2_1455_replaced([11186237](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274HevvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 0 or to 2 and the UE is a coherent UE according to the IE puschTransCohence (see 5G_UP_ALG_991_replaced([11103323](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knuQHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is: ulRank2Sinr Sum [i, j, t] = 10log10 (1/2 * (ulRank2Sinrin[1][i, j, t] + ulRank2Sinrun[2][i,j,t]))[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7655.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

with:

i: Index of the UE

j: Index of the carrier

t: Time (UL slot) for that the SINR is predicted

[image-1][image_desc]ulRank2Sinr[1][i, j, t][/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7655.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]: SINR of the first layer related to Rank2 in linear scale

[image-2][image_desc]ulRank2Sinr[2][i, j, t][/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7655.003.png[/image_path][/image-2]: SINR of the second layer related to Rank2 in linear scale

ulRank2Sinr[1] and ulRank2Sinr[2] are provided in the dB domain in UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs (both ulPmiRank2Sinr[0][1] and sinr[0][1]) and hence shall be converted into the linear domain before the average is calculated.

The mean SINR ulRank2SinrSum[i,j,t] is calculated either based on ulPmiRank2Sinr[0][1] of the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message or based on ‘sinr[0][1]’ of the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message depending on the setting of the R&D parameters rdSINRusedForRank2LA (see 5G_L2_1454_replaced([11186231](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274HefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_11068_replaced([11131303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CNI-88099-AA]

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131505: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131505: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131505: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Different to the SINR averaging method of pending Rank2 transmissions, which is defined in [Before CNI-88099-M] 5G_UP_ALG_3081_replaced([11131259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CNI-88099-M] 5G_UP_ALG_22710_replaced([11131439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CNI-88099-M], the L2-PS shall provide an alternative method for the averaging of the layer-specific SINR parameter. The alternative method shall allow the calculation of the harmonic mean of the two layers, which leads to a more conservative average of the two layers compared to the method defined in [Before CNI-88099-M] 5G_UP_ALG_3081_replaced([11131259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CNI-88099-M] 5G_UP_ALG_22710_replaced([11131439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCp7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CNI-88099-M].

For this purpose, the sum of the measurements [Before CNI-88099-M] ulPmiRank2SinrSum [CNI-88099-M] ulRank2SinrSum [End CNI-88099-M] shall be calculated based on the following equation if the R&D parameter rdAverageBetween2LayersFromPusch (see 5G_L2_1455_replaced([11186237](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274HevvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1 or to 2 and the UE is a non-coherent UE according to the IE puschTransCohence (see 5G_UP_ALG_991_replaced([11103323](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knuQHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[BeforeCNI-88099-M]

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is: ulPmiRank2SinrSum[i,j,t] = 10log10(2 / (1/ulPmiRank2Sinrun[1][i,j,t] + 1/ulPmiRank2Sinrun[2][i,j,t]))[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7658.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

[CNI-88099-M]

[image-1][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is: ulRank2Sinr Sum[i, j, t] = 10log10 ( 2 / ( (1 / ulRank2Sinrlin[1][i,j,t]) + (1 / ulRank2Sinrin[2][i, j,t]) ) )[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7658.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]

[End CNI-88099-M]

with:

i: Index of the UE

j: Index of the carrier

t: Time (UL slot) for that the SINR is predicted

[Before CNI-88099-M]

[image-2][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written in a stylized font and appears to be: $ulPmiRank2Sinr_{in} [1](\\zeta, t)$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7658.003.png[/image_path][/image-2]: SINR of the first layer related to Rank2 in linear scale

The text reads: "uiPmiRank2Sinn [2] (i, j, e)" The characters are in a sans-serif font. The background is a gradient of white and light yellow, with some darker areas at the bottom. The text itself is black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7658.004.png[/image_path][/image-3]: SINR of the second layer related to Rank2 in linear scale

[CNI-88099-M]

[image-4][image_desc]ulRank2Sinr[1][i, j, t][/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7658.005.png[/image_path][/image-4]: SINR of the first layer related to Rank2 in linear scale

[image-5][image_desc]ulRank2Sinr [2][i, j, t][/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7658.006.png[/image_path][/image-5]: SINR of the second layer related to Rank2 in linear scale

[End CNI-88099-M]

[Before CNI-88099-M] ulPmiRank2Sinr[1] [CNI-88099-M] ulRank2Sinr[1] [End CNI-88099-M] and [Before CNI-88099-M] ulPmiRank2Sinr[2] [CNI-88099-M] ulRank2Sinr[1] [End CNI-88099-M] are provided in the dB domain in UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs [CNI-88099-M] (both ulPmiRank2Sinr[0][1] and sinr[0][1]) [End CNI-88099-M] [Before CNI-88099-M] and UlData_SrsReceiveRespPs [End CNI-88099-M] and hence shall be converted into the linear domain before the average is calculated.

[CNI-88099-M] The mean SINR ulRank2SinrSum[i,j,t] is calculated either based on ulPmiRank2Sinr[0][1] of the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message or based on ‘sinr[0][1]’ of the UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message depending on the setting of the R&D parameters rdSINRusedForRank2LA (see 5G_L2_1454_replaced([11186231](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274HefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_11068_replaced([11131303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CNI-88099-M]

---

#### 3.8.3.1.0-7 Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation MCS Selection and Adaptive Transmission Bandwidth (ATB) (ID: 11131511)

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11131515`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Determination of the UL MCS and the maximum number of PRBs for PUSCH allocation

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11131521`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Overview

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12472288`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Determination of UL MCS and maximum number of PUSCH PRBs for allocation is performed in the following steps.

 SINR expiry timer (5G_UP_ALG_17315_replaced([11132149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGFPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 Re-correction of WB-SINR (5G_UP_ALG_17271_replaced([11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 MCS selection ([Before CB014045-A]5G_UP_ALG_17280_replaced([11131696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))[End CB014045-A]) based on comparison of the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR and the required SINR (5G_UP_ALG_17277_replaced([11131660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

o For MCS = 0, MPR and ATB PUSCH allocation (5G_UP_ALG_17299_replaced([11132066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krEfCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

o For MCS equals specific MCS, MCS switching point handling (5G_UP_ALG_17289_replaced([11131894](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD3_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

o For high MCS, Effective code rate check (5G_UP_ALG_17296_replaced([11132055](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krEfB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[CB014045-A]

If link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency is activated for UL ([12472235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OeKtoA1aEfCuhewgqkUVKQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

For a power limited UE: the MCS selection shall be done according to ([12492826](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_dv5E0BL4EfCph-OiSyk16Q "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2ftx_dv5e0bl4efcph-oisyk16q&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf")). Note: MCS Switching point handling (5G_UP_ALG_17289_replaced([11131894](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD3_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fmd_tauaapvfee-aqvopbp1qhq&artifactinmodule=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresourc"))) is not triggered anymore;

For a non power limited UE: MCS selection shall be done according to 5G_UP_ALG_17280_replaced([11131696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fmd_tauaapvfee-aqvopbp1qhq&artifactinmodule=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresourc")), except that ATB is not triggered but rrmMaxNumPrbUl = minimal PRBs for PUSCH transmission (see [11199457](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) rrmUlProposedMcs is the smallest MCS that can make TBS of (rrmUlProposedMcs, rrmMaxNumPrbUl ) >= the minimal TBS as defined in [11199457](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Else

MCS selection shall be done according to 5G_UP_ALG_17280_replaced([11131696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CB014045-A]

 MCS downgrading (5G_UP_ALG_17325_replaced([11132045](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krEfBPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Furthermore, the flowcharts for MCS selection algorithm and ATB are given in 5G_UP_ALG_17282_replaced([11131866](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD3-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_17311_replaced([11132134](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) respectively.

If NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 16, L2PS shall select 8RX or 16RX MCS table according to rdSuUeReceiverSize (5G_UP_ALG_27595_replaced([11114156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) no matter NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is true or false.

If NRCELL.ulSuMimoEnh.enhRankSelectSe is set to True, the MCS determination for short term rank selection is performed (5G_UP_ALG_30887_replaced([11132172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**[CB014045-A]**

If Link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is enabled, gNB-DU shall perform proposed MCS selection at FDM phase. (details in [12472237](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1MH6QA1cEfCuhewgqkUVKQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

**[End CB014045-A]**

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11131543`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131654: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131654: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131654: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Based on the corrected average WB-SINR measurement (see 5G_UP_ALG_3087_replaced([11130243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the Inner Loop Link Adaptation shall determine the MCS, which is best suited for the pending UL transmission. Additionally, the Adaptive Transmission Bandwidth (ATB) shall shrink the PUSCH PRB allocation for allocations using the smallest MCS (MCS0) [CB008246-E-UPD001] if UE is not scheduled with qam64LowSE table or using MCS=rdSmallestMcsATBLowSE (5G_UP_ALG_22528_replaced([11138679](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krhK8_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_17299_replaced([11132066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krEfCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if UE is scheduled with qam64LowSE-Index table) [End CB008246-E-UPD001] whenever the corrected average WB-SINR can’t satisfy the SINR conditions of the evaluated PRB allocation. For the evaluation of PUSCH allocations the corrected average WB-SINR shall be re-corrected by an unnormalization function, which considers the number of PRBs of the evaluated PUSCH allocation. The re-correction is calculated as follows.

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a sans-serif font. The formula defines a function `rrmSinrReCorrection(i, j, t)` as the maximum of two values. The first value is `10log10(rrmEvalNumPrbUl[i, j, t])`. The second value is the minimum of two expressions: `rrmPhr[i, j, t_PHR] + 10 log10(rrmNumPuschPrb[i, t, t_PHR])` and `10log10(rrmMaxNumPuschPrb)`. The formula uses mathematical operators such as `max`, `min`, `log10`, addition, and array indexing.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

For an FR1 Ul inter-band CA UE which is in power split mode according to 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the re-correction shall be calculated based on split TX power on SCell in Ul overlapping slots as the below:

[image-1][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]

with

i: Index of the UE

j: Index of the carrier

t: Time (UL slot) the PUSCH transmission is received

rrmSinrCorrection[i,j,t]: SINR Correction to normalize rrmInstSinr

rrmEvalNumPrbUl[i,j,t]: Candidate number of PRBs for PUSCH transmission being evaluated

rrmNumPuschPrb[i,j,tPHR]: Number of PUSCH PRBs contributing to the UL transmission with PHR

rrmMaxNumPuschPrb: Number of PRBs available for PUSCH in the particular bandwidth system

splitTxPower[i,SCell,t]: split TX power given to SCell, shall be converted to dBm from mW for the calculation and refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_10881_replaced([11119868](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[image-2][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.003.png[/image_path][/image-2]: [image-3][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.004.png[/image_path][/image-3]in the PHR report for SCell

Finally, the rescaled corrected average SINR shall be calculated by the difference of the corrected average SINR , the SINR re-correction factor.

[image-4][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.005.png[/image_path][/image-4]

For an FR1 Ul inter-band CA UE which is in power split mode according to 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the rescaled corrected average SINR shall be calculated based on split TX power on SCell in Ul overlapping slots as the below:

[image-5][image_desc]The image is completely black.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.006.png[/image_path][/image-5]

[image-6][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.007.png[/image_path][/image-6]

with

i: Index of the 5G UE

j: Index of the carrier

t: Slot the calculation relates to

rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr[i,j,t]: Rescaled and corrected average WB-SINR.

rrmCorrAvgSinr[i,j,t]: Corrected average WB-SINR.

rrmSinrReCorrection[i,j,t]: SINR re-correction related to the PRB allocation under evaluation

splitTxPower[i,SCell,t]: split TX power given to SCell, shall be converted to dBm from mW for the calculation and refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_10881_replaced([11119868](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[image-7][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible objects, text, or features.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.008.png[/image_path][/image-7]: refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10873_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

rrmNumPuschPrb[i,j,tPHR]: Number of PUSCH PRBs contributing to the UL transmission with PHR

rrmMaxNumPuschPrb: Number of PRBs available for PUSCH in the particular bandwidth system

[image-8][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.009.png[/image_path][/image-8]: [image-9][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.010.png[/image_path][/image-9]in the PHR report for SCell

[image-10][image_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7668.011.png[/image_path][/image-10]: Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_14301_replaced([11130295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr in the above equation is the WB-SU-SINR. L2RT should calculate MU-SINR according to SU-SINR rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr as input (5G_UP_ALG_8348_replaced([11148500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksKEMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if NIDD: NRCELL.ulMuMimoParaSet.ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 0 (MU-SINR estimation).

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 12565140: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 12565140: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 12565140: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation For the selection of the best suited MCS, the link adaptation shall start on request of the UL scheduler with the comparison of the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR and the required SINR (see 5G_UP_ALG_3100_replaced([11132185](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of the highest MCS available for UL scheduling (see 5G_L2_642_replaced([11164067](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25qg9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Different tables shall specify the required SINR depending on the rank and slot type applied by the UL scheduler.

For UE without FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA configured:

  * The rescaled corrected average WB-SINR shall be decreased by the configured MPR if the PUSCH allocation is greater than the bandwidth specific inner RB allocation (see 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The adaptation of the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR shall be applied for FDD and TDD FR1 [Before CNI-134962] with a single UE in scheduling set (FDM scheduler is not activated) [End CNI-134962]. Depending if the link adaptation controls the MCS evaluation in an FDD deployment or an TDD FR1 deployment either the R&D parameter rdMprFdd (see 5G_L2_1375_replaced([11185245](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or the R&D parameter rdMprTddFr1 (see 5G_L2_1376_replaced([11185252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) defines the value the rescaled corrected average SINR is decreased.

  * For an FR1 Ul inter-band CA UE which is in power split mode according to 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR shall be decreased by MPRBasedOnSplitPower below on SCell in Ul overlapping slots, if the PUSCH allocation is greater than the bandwidth specific inner RB allocation (see 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and UE is power limited (defined by 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):




[image-0][image_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7672.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

with

i: Index of the UE

t: Time (UL slot) the PUSCH transmission is received

splitTxPower[i,SCell,t]: split TX power given to SCell, shall be converted to dBm from mW for the calculation and refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_10881_replaced([11119868](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[image-1][image_desc]The image is completely black. There is no discernible content, text, or objects within the frame.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7672.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]: refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10873_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

For UE configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA:

  * The rescaled corrected average WB-SINR shall not be decreased by the configured MPR, if the ILLA is performed at UL SINR reporting before resource allocation in FD.

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11131696`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation MCS selection

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11131699`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Algorithm

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-4.0-1.0-9**  (ID: `13240182`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13240182: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation MCS selection is determined by PRB number and SINR in SINR to MCS mapping tables defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3100_replaced([11132185](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_3112_replaced([11132202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If NIDD NRCELL.actUlMuMimo **is configured to true AND NIDD: NRCELL.ulMuMimoParaSet.ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 1 (MCS compensation), L2RT should adjust final MCS based on requirement in 5G_UP_ALG_8349_replaced([11148930](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksLSS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).** [CB014045-A] After the resource allocation in FD scheduler, if UE i is paired with other UE, gNB-DU shall re-evaluate the finally selected MCS of UE i according to the rescaled MU-SINR of UE(i) for PRB number after FD allocation(5G_UP_ALG_8348_replaced([11148500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksKEMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **if NIDD: NRCELL.ulMuMimoParaSet.ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch is set to 0 (MU-SINR estimation).** If link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is enabled ([12472235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OeKtoA1aEfCuhewgqkUVKQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), ILLA shall also perform proposed MCS selection at FDM phase (i.e, before resource allocation in FD) in FR1 as [12472327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_RTT0sw3cEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). [End CB014045-A] If the ILLA is performed [Before CB014045-A]at UL SINR reporting[End CB014045-A] before resource allocation in FD: * If UE is not configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA It shall consider for the selection of the MCS only PUSCH allocation of full PRB allocation (this is used in in 5G_UP_ALG_4856_replaced([11195916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv_bQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). If rdMprActive (see 5G_L2_1371_replaced([11185224](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wysPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1 or 2 and the UE is classified as power limited the PUSCH allocation is shrunk after the MCS switching point and shall be compliant to the size of the inner RB allocation specified in (5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The PRB allocation shall be shrunk for the deployment defined by rdMprActiveFddTdd (see 5G_L2_1372_replaced([11185228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wysfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Independent on the setting of the R&D parameter rdMprActive and rdMprActiveFddTdd the PRB allocation shall not be shrunk if the gNB is configured for the bands defined with R&D parameter rdMprDisableBandsFr1 (see 5G_L2_3622_replaced([11185218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wLr_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or if the gNB is setup for a DSS configuration (NRCELL.lteNrDssMode != 0). [CB014045-A] If link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is activated ([12472235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OeKtoA1aEfCuhewgqkUVKQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), MCS switching point handling shall not be triggered (See [11131521](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).[End CB014045-A] * else if UE is configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA * It shall consider for the selection of the MCS only PUSCH allocation of full PRB allocation on both PCell and SCell with UL CA. Else if the ILLA is performed in final link adaptation stage after resource allocation in FD scheduler (5G_UP_ALG_5026_replaced([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))): It shall consider for the selection of the MCS the number of allocated PRB resources if NIDD NRCELL.actUlOptMcsSelection is False. For the VoNR capable users with active **5QI-1/65/66 bearer for voice service if either (the UE is not SAg capable) or (NRCELL.actUlSlotAgg is set to FALSE), then, rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15554_replaced([11203613](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are followed for possible MCS reselection when the MCS is evaluated to be MCS0, to determine the TB size** [Before CB014045-A]If UE i paired with other UE, L2RT shall re-evaluate the finally selected MCS of UE i according to the rescaled MU-SINR of UE(i) for PRB number after FD allocation(5G_UP_ALG_8348_replaced([11148500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksKEMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **if NIDD: NRCELL.ulMuMimoParaSet.ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 0 (MU-SINR estimation)[End CB014045-A]** * For VoNR users with active 5QI-1/65/66 bearer for voice service, if the UE is SAg capable and NRCELL.actUlSlotAgg is set to Enabled_VoNr, then it is possible that a 2x or a 4x SAg grant will be used. If a 2x or 4x SAg grant is used, then the TBS size, the used MCS and the number of PRBs used will be set as defined by 5G_UP_ALG_19882_replaced([11205071](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwnGVfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). * If UE is configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA If (SCell with intra-band contiguous UL CA is deactivated or transmission buffer in UL is not split between PCell and SCell (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and UE is power limited (defined by 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the PUSCH allocation is outer RB allocation for contiguous RB allocation MPR for outer RB allocation for contiguous RB allocation (specified in 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be decreased for the selection of the MCS. else No MPR is decreased for the selection of the MCS. endif endif * If UE is power limited (defined by 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRCELL.actUl256Qam is enabled and UE is in 256QAM mode (then UE is scheduled with Table 5.1.3.1-2 for 256QAM) Fetch the SINR threshold for MCS20, i.e, SINR_threshold_MCS20, which is the first 256QAM modulation in with Table 5.1.3.1-2 for 256QAM) from 5G_UP_ALG_3112_replaced([11132202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (Depending on FDD, TDD-FR1 different Simplified SINR to MCS mapping table will be used.) if the rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr[i,j,t] < SINR_threshold_MCS20 do nothing if the rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr[i,j,t] >= SINR_threshold_MCS20 + DeltaMPR256QAM Select the highest MCS with requested SINR for this MCS is no bigger than rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr[i,j,t] - DeltaMPR256QAM **Note:** When rdMprQam256ActiveFddTdd (see 5G_L2_3347_replaced([11184869](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27uWcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is enabled for the current technology and predicted MCS is MCS20 <= MCS <= MCS27, DeltaMPR256QAM is defined as follows: if **UE is not configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA** DeltaMPR256QAM = 3dB (Note that there is 3dB difference between 256QAM and below 256QAM especially 64QAM in 3GPPTS38.101-1 section 6.2.2)**.** else if UE is configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA if SCell with intra-band contiguous UL CA is deactivated or transmission buffer in UL is not split between PCell and SCell (see 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) DeltaMPR256QAM = 3dB else DeltaMPR256QAM = 0 endif endif else {select MCS19} For an FR1 Ul inter-band CA UE which is in power split mode according to 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the MCS shall be selected based on split TX power on SCell in Ul overlapping slots as the below: if the rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr[i,j,t] < SINR_threshold_MCS20 do nothing; else if the PUSCH allocation is greater than the bandwidth specific inner RB allocation specified in 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [image-0][image_desc]if rrm Rescalel Corr Avg Snr[i, SCell,t] ≥ SINR_threshold_MCS20 +max(min(splitTxPower[i, SCell,t], PCMAXSCL-MPR)- (PCMAXSC.[i,t]-MPR-Delta MPR 256QAM),0)[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7681.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] { Select the highest MCS with requested SINR for this MCS is no bigger than [image-1][image_desc]rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr[i, SCell, t]-max(min (splitTxPower[i, SCell, t], PCMAX.Scen-MPR)-(PCMAXSCen[i,t]-MPR-DeltaMPR256QAM),0)[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7681.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] } else {select MCS19} endif else [image-2][image_desc]if rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr[i,SCell,t] ≥ SINR_threshold_MCS20 + max {splitTxPower[i,SCell,t] - (PCMAX,SCell[i,t] - DeltaMPR256QAM),0}[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7681.003.png[/image_path][/image-2] { Select the highest MCS with requested SINR for this MCS is no bigger than [image-3][image_desc]rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr[i, SCell,t]-max(splitTxPower[i, SCell, t] - PCMAXScen[i,t] - DeltaMPR256QAM),0)[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7681.004.png[/image_path][/image-3] } else {select MCS19} endif endif Note: splitTxPower[i,SCell,t] and [image-4][image_desc]$\tilde{P}_{\text{cMAX,Scell}}$[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7681.005.png[/image_path][/image-4] see above, and MPR see below. endif **[TDD] Note: If the FDM scheduler will re-evaluate the finally selected MCS again after the number of PRBs is decided and an UCI is sent via PUSCH, the required SINR shall be adapted in the SINR-to-MCS mapping table by the SINR offset values defined in 5G_UP_ALG_3145_replaced([11130475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mjvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The SINR offset depends on type of UCI and number of UCI bits, which will be transferred via PUSCH as well as the number of PRBs the FDM scheduler shall grant.** In case of transmission of PUSCH, if UE is configured with LowSE MCS table and works in high reliability LA mode \- if rrmUlProposedMcs or reselected MCS after resource allocation in FD scheduler (5G_UP_ALG_5026_replaced([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is higher than or equal to NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaMcsMax64qamLowSERANK1HR while UE works with RANK1, or \- if rrmUlProposedMcs or reselected MCS after resource allocation in FD scheduler (5G_UP_ALG_5026_replaced([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is higher than or equal to NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaMcsMax64qamLowSERANK2HR while UE works with RANK2 rrmUlProposedMcs or reselected MCS after resource allocation in FD scheduler (5G_UP_ALG_5026_replaced([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be set to corresponding NIDD parameter value. In case of transmission of PUSCH, if UE is configured with 64QAM MCS table and works in high reliability LA mode \- if rrmUlProposedMcs or reselected MCS after resource allocation in FD scheduler (5G_UP_ALG_5026_replaced([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is higher than or equal to NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaMcsMax64qamRANK1HR while UE works with RANK1, or \- if rrmUlProposedMcs or reselected MCS after resource allocation in FD scheduler (5G_UP_ALG_5026_replaced([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is higher than or equal to NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaMcsMax64qamRANK2HR while UE works with RANK2 rrmUlProposedMcs or reselected MCS after resource allocation in FD scheduler (5G_UP_ALG_5026_replaced([11201742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZD4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be set to corresponding NIDD parameter value.

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131890: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131890: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11131890: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation [image-0][image_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating the MCS (Modulation and Coding Scheme) selection process. Here's a breakdown of the flowchart: **Start:** The process begins with "MCS Selection". **Request to provide UL MCS:** The first step is a request to provide Uplink MCS. **Variable Assignments:** * `rrMaxNumPrui = rrMaxNumPuschPb` **Decision Point:** * `rdnrExpiryTime expired` **If`rdnrExpiryTime` is expired:** * **Process:** Recalculate SINR for `mEvaNumPrui` (`mEscalatedComAvgSin`). * **Process:** Setup sorted list of available MCSs. * **Process:** `MCSI = biggest MCS available in list`. **Decision Point:** * `MCSI == rrnumSupplUMcsList` * **If YES:** * **Decision Point:** `MCSI == rrMaxNumPrui` * **If YES:** * **Process:** Execute ATB Algorithm. * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection. * **If NO:** * **Decision Point:** `Scaled PHR >= rdphr Threshold` * **If YES:** * **Decision Point:** `MCSI == rrMaxSwitchingPoint` * **If YES:** * **Process:** `rrMaxNumPrui = inner RB allocation`. * **Process:** Select next MCS related inner RB allocation. * **Process:** Recreate sorted list of available MCSs. * **Process:** `MCSI = biggest MCS from list`. * **Process:** Remove evaluated MCS from list. * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection. * **If NO:** * **Process:** Determine `rrEscalatedComAvgSin` by MPR during next MCS evaluation. * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection. * **If NO:** * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection. * **If NO:** * **Process:** `rrMaxNumPrui = rrMaxNumPuschPb`. * **Decision Point:** `Scaled PHR >= rdphr Threshold` * **If YES:** * **Decision Point:** `MCSI == rrMaxSwitchingPoint` * **If YES:** * **Process:** `rrMaxNumPrui = inner RB allocation`. * **Process:** Select next MCS related inner RB allocation. * **Process:** Recreate sorted list of available MCSs. * **Process:** `MCSI = biggest MCS from list`. * **Process:** Remove evaluated MCS from list. * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection. * **If NO:** * **Process:** Determine `rrEscalatedComAvgSin` by MPR during next MCS evaluation. * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection. * **If NO:** * **Decision Point:** `average WBSS >= requested SNR for MCS` * **If YES:** * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection. * **If NO:** * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection. **If`rdnrExpiryTime` is NOT expired:** * **Process:** `rrProposed MCS = MCSI`. * **End:** MCS selection.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7684.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] Figure1: MCS selection processing of a user [CB006449-AA] without FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA configured [End CB006449-AA] (carrier basis) [CB006449-AA] [image-1][image_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating the MCS (Modulation and Coding Scheme) selection process. Here's a breakdown of the flowchart: 1\. **Start:** The process begins with "MCS Selection". 2\. **Request to provide UL MCS:** The system requests the Uplink MCS. 3\. **`rmMaxNumPibul = rmMaxNumPusch/Prb`:** A calculation is performed to set `rmMaxNumPibul`. 4\. **`rdSinr Expiry Time expired` (Decision):** A check is made to see if the `rdSinr Expiry Time` has expired. * If **Yes** : * **Rescale SINIR for`rmEvalNumPrbul` (`rmRescaledCorrAvgSinr`)**: The SINIR (Signal-to-Interference-plus-Noise Ratio) is rescaled. * **Setup sorted list of available MCSes** : A sorted list of available MCSes is created. * **`MCSI = biggest MCS available in list`** : The `MCSI` is set to the largest MCS in the list. * **`MCSI == min(rmSuppUIMcsList)` (Decision):** A check is made if `MCSI` is equal to the minimum value in `rmSuppUIMcsList`. * If **Yes** : * **`MCSI == MCS0` (Decision):** A check is made if `MCSI` is equal to `MCS0`. * If **Yes** : * **Execute ATB Algorithm** : The ATB Algorithm is executed. * **`rmUIProposed Mcs = MCSI`** : The `rmUIProposed Mcs` is set to `MCSI`. * **End MCS Selection** : The process ends. * If **No** : * **`rmUIProposed Mcs = MCSI`** : The `rmUIProposed Mcs` is set to `MCSI`. * **End MCS Selection** : The process ends. * If **No** : * **`MCSI = biggest MCS from list`** : The `MCSI` is set to the largest MCS from the list. * **Remove evaluated MCS from list** : The evaluated MCS is removed from the list. * **`average corr WB-SINR> requested SINR for MCSI` (Decision):** A check is made if the average correlated Wideband SINR is greater than the requested SINR for `MCSI`. * If **Yes** : * **`rmUIProposed Mcs = MCSI`** : The `rmUIProposed Mcs` is set to `MCSI`. * **End MCS Selection** : The process ends. * If **No** : * **`rmUIProposed Mcs = ullainiMos`** : The `rmUIProposed Mcs` is set to `ullainiMos`. * **End MCS Selection** : The process ends. * If **No** (i.e., `rdSinr Expiry Time` is not expired): * **`MCSI == MCS0` (Decision):** A check is made if `MCSI` is equal to `MCS0`. * If **Yes** : * **Execute ATB Algorithm** : The ATB Algorithm is executed. * **`rmUIProposed Mcs = MCSI`** : The `rmUIProposed Mcs` is set to `MCSI`. * **End MCS Selection** : The process ends. * If **No** : * **`rmUIProposed Mcs = MCSI`** : The `rmUIProposed Mcs` is set to `MCSI`. * **End MCS Selection** : The process ends. The flowchart uses standard flowchart symbols: rounded rectangles for start/end, rectangles for processes, and diamonds for decisions. Arrows indicate the flow of control.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7684.002.png[/image_path][/image-1] Figure2: MCS selection processing of a user configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA (carrier basis) [End CB006449-AA] File: 5GC000517_5GC001796_ DLLA_and_ULLA.vsdx for Figure1 [CB006449-AA] File: MCS selection for FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA.vsd for Figure2 [End CB006449-AA] Folder:

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `12472237`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation UL Proposed MCS Selection Before FD (Link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL)

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12472235`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Activation Link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12472236`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If NIDD parameter NRCELL.actLaEnhanceEfficiencyLatency is set to “UL” or “DL_UL”, then

• Link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is enabled

Else

• Link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is disabled

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12472327`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation UL proposed MCS Selection before FD

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12472328`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation When link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for UL is enabled ([12472235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OeKtoA1aEfCuhewgqkUVKQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), the UL proposed MCS selection algorithm is defined hereafter. 

If UE is not power limited ([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),

  * It shall consider for the selection of the MCS the full PRB allocation (Denoted as rrmMaxNumPrbUl) on the cell as [11131696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * The rescaled corrected average WB-SINR for full PRB allocation is calculated as [11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). Denoted as rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr
  * The proposed MCS is the highest MCS whose required SINR can be satisfied by rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr. See [11131660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_kovdcPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11131696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_k0n9QPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). Denoted as rrmUlProposedMcs.



If UE is power limited ([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),

  * gNB shall calculate as [12472293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kRoEYg3SEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), MCS_N, SINR_N and PRB_N are output of [12472293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kRoEYg3SEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * rrmUlProposedMcs = MCS_N
  * rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr = SINR_N
  * rrmMaxNumPrbUl = PRB_N

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `11131894`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation MCS switching point

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-6.0-5**  (ID: `13461085`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461085: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR is equal or greater than the required WB-SINR of the highest available MCS, this MCS shall be selected by the ILLA. If the comparison fails, the comparison continues with the next smaller MCS out of the set defined in 5G_L2_642_replaced([11164067](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25qg9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and shall be repeated until the most suitable MCS is selected, which satisfies the SINR condition. If the MPR aware UL link adaptation is active and the comparison fails for a power limited UE (scaled PHR is equal or smaller than rdPhrThreshold (see 5G_L2_1374_replaced([11185240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wys_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) with the MCS next before the MCS switching point, the comparison shall be restarted with a PRB allocation conform to the size of the inner RB allocation. The MCS switching points are defined for FDD and TDD FR1 depending on the configured MPR either by the R&D parameter rdMprFdd (see 5G_L2_1375_replaced([11185245](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or by the R&D parameter rdMprTddFr1 (see 5G_L2_1376_replaced([11185252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) depending on the deployment of the gNB.

[Before CB013712-A] 

In case of ABIL:

If NRCELL.actUl256Qam is not enabled and UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-1 for 64QAM** as **Basic Reliability (e.g., 10% BLER) then** the following table shall be used.**_*_** *

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIL case\n64QAM rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS3 MCS3 MCS4 MCS5 MCS5 MCS8[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_0.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 28 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-1 for 64QAM** as **High Reliability (e.g., 1% BLER)** then **the following table shall be used.****_*_** *

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIL case\n64QAM rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS1 MCS3 MCS4 MCS4 MCS6 MCS8[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_1.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 28 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If NRCELL.actUl256Qam is enabled and UE is in 256QAM mode then UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-2 for 256QAM** then **the following table shall be used.** ****

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIL case\n256QAM rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS0 MCS1 MCS1 MCS2 MCS2 MCS4[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_2.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 27 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

(Note: only ABIL and only FDD is supported in CB007797)

If UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-3 for 64QAM** LowSE **as** Basic Reliability (e.g., 10% BLER) **then** the following table shall be used.**_*_** *****

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIL case\n64QAM Low SE rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS2 MCS3 MCS4 MCS4 MCS4 MCS5[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_3.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 28 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-3 for 64QAM** LowSE **as** High Reliability (e.g., 1% BLER) **then** the following table shall be used.**_*_** *****

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIL case\n64QAM Low SE rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS2 MCS4 MCS4 MCS4 MCS4 MCS5[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_4.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 28 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CB013712-A] 

In case of Loki **and Thor L1 variant** HW****

If NRCELL.actUl256Qam is not enabled or if NRCELL.actUl256Qam is enabled but UE is in non256QAM mode then UE is scheduled with **Table 5.1.3.1-1 for 64QAM** as **Basic Reliability (e.g., 10% BLER) then** the following table shall be used.**_*_** *

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIO/ABIN/ABIP case\n64QAM rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS1 MCS1 MCS4 MCS4 MCS5 MCS8[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_5.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 28 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-1 for 64QAM** as **High Reliability (e.g., 1% BLER)** then **the following table shall be used.****_*_** *

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIO/ABIN/ABIP case\n64QAM rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS1 MCS2 MCS4 MCS5 MCS5 MCS8[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_6.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 28 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If NRCELL.actUl256Qam is enabled and UE is in 256QAM mode then UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-2 for 256QAM** then **the following table shall be used.** ****

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIO/ABIN/ABIP case\n256QAM rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS0 MCS0 MCS2 MCS2 MCS2 MCS4[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_7.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 27 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-3 for 64QAM** LowSE **as** Basic Reliability (e.g., 10% BLER) **then** the following table shall be used.**_*_** *****

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIO/ABIN/ABIP case\n64QAM Low SE rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS3 MCS4 MCS4 MCS5 MCS5 MCS5[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_8.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 28 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If UE is scheduled with Table **5.1.3.1-3 for 64QAM** LowSE **as** High Reliability (e.g., 1% BLER) **then** the following table shall be used.**_*_** *****

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- NaN ABIO/ABIN/ABIP case\n64QAM Low SE rdMprFdd / rdMprTddFr1 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN 0.5..0.9dB 1.0..1.4dB 1.5..1.9dB 2.0..2.4dB 2.5..2.9dB >=3.0dB NaN MCS switching point MCS3 MCS4 MCS4 MCS5 MCS5 MCS5[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file7689_9.xlsx[/xlsx_path] 

The predefined MCS switching point can be overwritten if the R&D parameter rdMcsStartConsiderMPR is set to a valid value between 0 and 28 (see 5G_L2_1377_replaced([11185258](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Depending on the system bandwidth and the gNB deployment (FDD or TDD FR1) the size of the inner RB allocation varies and is specified in 5G_UP_ALG_9755_replaced([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). With the change of the allocation to the smaller PRB allocation the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR shall be increased by the MPR and the comparison shall be restarted for the smaller PRB allocation. The parameter rrmMaxNumPrbUl shall be set to the number of PRBs corresponding to the inner RB allocation. The first MCS index that passes the SINR comparison shall be selected and forwarded to the UL scheduler (rrmUlProposedMcs). In any case, the lowest available MCS shall be selected if the comparison procedure can’t find a suitable MCS.

For UE configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA, it shall not consider MCS switching point for the selection of the MCS.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `11132045`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation MCS downgrading

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11132049`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The downgrade of the proposed MCS rrmUlProposedMcs to the next smaller MCS as applied for the long PUCCH FDD is not no longer explicitly requested and shall be replaced by an UCI-individual SINR adaptation in the SINR to MCS mapping tables (see 5G_UP_ALG_3145_replaced([11130475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mjvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). With the UCI-individual SINR adaptation the SINR-to-MCS mapping tables shall be corrected by individual SINR offset values during the slot the UE carries an UCI and hence the required SINR needs to be increased. Different SINR offset values depending on the PRB allocation size and the type of UCI as well as the number of UCI bits shall be introduced. Different SINR offset parameters shall be aggregated if different types of UCI are added to PUSCH.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `11132055`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Effective code rate check

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11132061`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Unlike PDSCH, there's no effective code rate restriction for PUSCH in 3gpp, however still an effective code rate limitation is needed to successfully decode the initial PUSCH transmission. Hence a code rate check shall be applied and the MCS/PRB combinations with a code rate greater than R&D parameter rdMaxPuschEffectiveCodeRate (defined by 5G_L2_1431_replaced([11184925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27uWfPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be excluded by the UL link adaptation and hence in UL scheduling.

The effective code rate is defined as in 5G_UP_ALG_2967_replaced([11124515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqrdc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

To calculate the effective code rate, nb_cdm_no_data is determined by MCSi according to 5G_UP_ALG_3098_replaced([11137832](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krbravvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The effective code rate of the MCS/PRB combinations with deactivated PTRS are always equal or below rdMaxPuschEffectiveCodeRate (defined by 5G_L2_1431_replaced([11184925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27uWfPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The correct SINR2MCS table shall be chosen additionally with respect to enableUlPtrs if ulPtrsFlag is not yet available during scheduling period.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-9**  (ID: `11132066`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation MPR and ATB PUSCH allocation

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-9.0-7**  (ID: `12741459`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If the NIDD parameter NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE.actRimMitigationExtend is set to TRUE and RIM UL mitigation extension is triggered (see 5G_UP_ALG_27175_replaced([11163444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktZaQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the gNB-DU shall use the corrected average SINR related to the UL slot the UE is scheduled (5G_UP_ALG_3087_replaced([11130243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for the evaluation of the maximum number of PUSCH PRBs (rrmMaxNumPrbUl). Additionally, the gNB-DU shall determine the maximum number of PUSCH PRBs, which can be granted if the ATB restricts the number of PUSCH PRBs, based on the SINR related to the 2nd UL slot. The gNB-DU shall apply the so calculated maximum number of PUSCH PRBs in FDM scheduler (rrmMaxNumPrbUlATB) in the following slot if the ATB is active.

For an FR1 Ul inter-band CA UE which is in power split mode according to 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), MPR in "MCS selection processing of a user" shall be based on split tx power and replaced by MPRBasedOnSplitPower defined above on SCell in Ul overlapping slots.

**Note:**

if MPRBasedOnSplitPower is equal to 0

Never go to MCS selection with rrmMaxNumPrbUl set to inner RB allocation since no MPR impact.

If UE is not scheduled with qam64LowSE-Index table and when the MCS index is equal to MCS0 **and the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR is still too small compared to the required SINR for the allocated number of PUSCH PRBs in 5G_UP_ALG_5010_replaced([11201008](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwTkUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (Tx power limited UE), the number of PUSCH PRB shall be decreased to have more power per PRB.**

If the UE is scheduled with qam64LowSE-Index table PRB reduction can be triggered for MCS0 or MCS > MCS0, according to the pattern/algorithm described below.

The required SINR shall not be corrected by the SINR offset parameter whenever UCI is carried via PUSCH (see 5G_UP_ALG_3145_replaced([11130475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mjvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For the VoNR capable users with active 5QI-1 bearer for voice service, rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15554_replaced([11203613](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are followed for possible MCS reselection **when the MCS is evaluated to be MCS0, to determine the TB size.**

The ATB algorithm shall rescale in descending order step by step the corrected average WB-SINR and the required SINR starting from the highest allocation candidate. All PRB allocations, are candidates for the evaluation.

After rescaling the corrected average WB-SINR for the PRB allocation under evaluation, the ATB is in the position to execute the comparison with the required SINR. Similar as for the MCS selection the ATB stops the comparison if the rescaled corrected average SINR is equal or greater than the required SINR and if the ATB is performed is assuming full WB PRB allocation:

forwards the so selected allocation size (rrmMaxNumPrbUl) to the UL scheduler as the upper limit rrmMaxNumPrbULATB.

Note: This method aims to minimize impacts on legacy ATB algorithm that starts from full BW. It can be enhanced to start from resource allocated in FD scheduler.

If UE is not scheduled with qam64LowSE table and if the SINR comparison fails, the ATB shall continue the comparison with the next smaller PUSCH PRB allocation specified in 5G_UP_IF_2270_replaced([11518563](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUqdJ_v1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and shall continue until the SINR comparison is passed. In any case rrmMaxNumPrbUl shall be set to the smallest PRB allocation defined in 5G_UP_IF_2270_replaced([11518563](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUqdJ_v1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if the SINR comparison fails for all specified PRB allocations.

If UE is scheduled with qam64LowSE table and if the SINR comparison fails with the highest allocation candidate and MCS= rdSmallestMcsATBLowSE (Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22528_replaced([11138679](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krhK8_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the ATB shall follow the following steps:

For MCS=rdSmallestMcsATBLowSE, L2-PS shall reduce step by step the amount of allocated PRBs till a combination (rdSmallestMcsATBLowSE, PRB >= rdMinPrbMcs0ForMinUlTbsLowSE (defined in 5G_UP_ALG_16862_replaced([11138670](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krhK8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ) which satisfies the SINR requirements.

  * If the SINR comparison fails on ( rdMinPrbMcs0ForMinUlTbsLowSE PRB, rdSmallestMcsATBLowSE), reduce MCS value from rdSmallestMcsATBLowSE to MCS0 until the SINR comparison is passed.
  * If the SINR comparison fails on ( rdMinPrbMcs0ForMinUlTbsLowSE PRB, MCS0), then do the following:
  * The ATB shrinks PRB below rdMinPrbMcs0ForMinUlTbsLowSE PRB using the smallest MCS which makes its TBS based on its MCS/PRB combination be greater than or equal to rdUlMinTbs (defined in 5G_UP_ALG_17009_replaced([11209054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwxeZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) until the SINR comparison is passed.
  * In any case rrmMaxNumPrbUl shall be set to the smallest PRB allocation 4PRB using the smallest MCS which makes its TBS based on its PRB/MCSx combination be greater than or equal to [Before PR846547] rdMinTbsLowSE [PR846547] rdUlMinTbs [End PR846547] (defined in 5G_UP_ALG_17009_replaced([11209054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwxeZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if the SINR comparison fails for all specified PRB allocations.
  * rrmLastATBStepFlagLowSE is set to true if the final ATB point 4PRBs/MCSx combination doesn’t satisfy the required SINR.



Editor's note: If the ATB shrinks the PRB allocation the following allocations are possible

  * FR1: 128PRB, 64PRB, 48PRB, 32PRB, 24PRB, 14PRB, 8PRB, 4PRB
  * FR2: 48PRB, 32PRB, 24PRB, 14PRB, 8PRB, 4PRB
  * FDD: 64PRB, 48PRB, 32PRB, 24PRB, 14PRB, 8PRB, 4PRB



If the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR is still too small compared to the required SINR for the last step of PRB allocation (4 PRB with MCS0), gNB-DU shall further shrink PRB in ATB for initial Tx according to 5G_UP_ALG_31946_replaced([11132110](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krEfEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and for reTx according to 5G_UP_ALG_32649_replaced([11132121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-10**  (ID: `11132110`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Optimized PUSCH PRB allocation for ATB initial Tx

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `12884299`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If 4PRB is already used with MCS0 for ATB, **and NRCELL.actOptPuschPrbAlloc is set to true** and rdOptPuschPrbAllocATB (5G_UP_ALG_31943_replaced([11139156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krk1X_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to [Before 05409086] true [05409086] 1(SA or NSA UEs) or 2 (only for SA UEs) [End 05409086] **and qam64LowSE table is not used, gNB-DU shall find minimal PRB rrmMinPuschPrbATB according to 5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with MCS0, and shrink the PRB in ATB with 3..minimal PRB with 1 PRB per allocation. E.g. if rrmMinPuschPrbATB is 1, the further PRB shrink shall be 3, 2, 1 PRB; If rrmMinPuschPrbATB is 2, the further PRB shrink shall be 3, 2 PRB; If rrmMinPuschPrbATB is 3, the further PRB shrink shall be 3 PRB. If rrmMinPuschPrbATB >= 4, no further PRB shrink for ATB.******

[05409086] Rationale: For disabling ATB enhancement in NSA deployments is, the LTE anchor provides foundational connectivity, allowing the NR leg to remain active and attempt data transmission even under severely degraded radio conditions. This prolonged operation in poor NR conditions significantly increases the likelihood of high Discontinuous Transmission (DTX) rates. [End 05409086]

[CB013204-A-UPD003] 

If UL PTRS is present, and the PRB allocation for the initial Tx is lower than to minimal PRB required by [11197403: Minimum allowed PUSCH PRBs when UL PTRS is configured](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_FHPWwPvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), the minimal PRB required by UL PTRS shall be used instead. 

If UCI is present, and the PRB allocation for the initial Tx is lower than minimal PRB required by [11197037: Minimum allowed PUSCH PRBs with UCI](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CveOIfvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ),

\- If minimal PRB required by UCI is not higher than 4, the minimal PRB required by UCI shall be used.

[End CB013204-A-UPD003] 

Endif

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-11**  (ID: `11132121`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Optimized PUSCH PRB allocation for ATB reTx

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-11.0-2**  (ID: `12884300`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If rdEnableAdaptiveReTxBpskWa is set to true ([11183202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27hiKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and Pi/2 BPSK modulation order is used by initial Tx, gNB-DU shall not conduct this requirement (i.e. not further shrink PRB in reTx). Instead, the reTx PRB shall be as same as initial Tx.   
Rationale: The misinterpretation of MCS28 by a QC chip set requests the use of the initial MCS for retransmissions if the initial transmission is scheduled by Pi/2-BPSK modulation order.

[CB013204-A-UPD003]

This requirement shall not be conducted for msg3 and msg5 scheduling.

[End CB013204-A-UPD003]

If minimal PRB (last step of PRB shrink) of initial Tx for ATB with MCS0 according to 5G_UP_ALG_31946_replaced([11132110](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krEfEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is between 2 and 4, **and NRCELL.actOptPuschPrbAlloc is set to true** and rdOptPuschPrbAllocATB (5G_UP_ALG_31943_replaced([11139156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krk1X_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to [Before 05409086] true [05409086] 1 (SA or NSA UEs) or 2 (only for SA UEs) [End 05409086] **and qam64LowSE table is not used** ****

Gnb-DU shall further shrink PRB in reTx.

If minimal PRB of initial Tx is 4, then PRB allocation for each reTx shall be [Before CB013204-A-UPD003] [4, 3, 2, 1, 1, 1...] [CB013204-A-UPD003] [4, 3, 2, 1, 4, 1, 1, 1, 4, 1, 1, 1...] [End CB013204-A-UPD003].

If minimal PRB of initial Tx is 3, then PRB allocation for each reTx shall be [Before CB013204-A-UPD003] [3, 2, 2, 1, 1, 1...] [CB013204-A-UPD003] [3, 2, 2, 1, 3, 1, 1, 1, 3, 1, 1, 1...] [End CB013204-A-UPD003].

If minimal PRB of initial Tx is 2, then PRB allocation for each reTx shall be [Before CB013204-A-UPD003] [2, 2, 1, 1, 1, 1...] [CB013204-A-UPD003] [2, 2, 1, 1, 2, 1, 1, 1, 2, 1, 1, 1...] [End CB013204-A-UPD003].

In case configured UL harq transmission number is lower than the pattern defined above, the PRB allocation of rest reTx is ignored. The PRB calculation based on NRCELL.minPctResourceReservedMcsUl for adaptive reTx is not performed here. Note: Reserved MCS shall be used in reTx in case number of PRB is different than initial Tx.

[CB013204-A-UPD003] 

For a reTx, if all previous Tx with same TB are decoded as DTX, the PRB allocation for the reTx shall be as same as initial Tx. The PRB pattern for reTx shall not be applied until a non-DTX PUSCH is decoded for the same TB. Rational: If all Tx are decoded as DTX, it is highly possible UE didn't receive UL DCI, then UE is not able to decode a reserved MCS where a different PRB is used for reTx. 

If UL PTRS is present, and the PRB allocation for the reTx is lower than to minimal PRB required by [11197403: Minimum allowed PUSCH PRBs when UL PTRS is configured](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_FHPWwPvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), the minimal PRB required by UL PTRS shall be used instead. 

If UCI is present, and the PRB allocation for the reTx is lower than to minimal PRB required by [11197037: Minimum allowed PUSCH PRBs with UCI](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CveOIfvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ),

\- If minimal PRB required by UCI is not higher than the PRB required by initial Tx, the minimal PRB required by UCI shall be used.

\- else the PUSCH transmission shall be postponed. 

[End CB013204-A-UPD003]

Endif

---
