Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11132143: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11132143: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11132143: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation [image-0][image_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a "Bandwidth Selection" process. The flowchart begins with a rounded rectangle labeled "Start Bandwidth Selection". From there, a diamond shape asks "Bandwidth Selection activated (rdActivateAtb)". If the answer is no, the flow continues to a rectangle labeled "Setup sorted list of avilable PRB allocations". If the answer is yes, the flow also continues to "Setup sorted list of avilable PRB allocations". Next, a rectangle states "rmEvalNumPbUl = biggest PRB allocation in list". Following this, a diamond shape checks if "rmEvalNumPrbUl == smallest PRB allocation". If the condition in the diamond is true, the flow moves to a rectangle labeled "rmEvalNumPbUI = biggest PRB allocation from list". From this rectangle, the flow goes to another rectangle labeled "Remove evaluated PRB allocation from list". If the condition in the diamond "rmEvalNumPrbUl == smallest PRB allocation" is false, the flow proceeds to a rectangle labeled "Rescale SINR for rmEvalNumPrbUl (mmRescaledCorrAvgSinr)". After the "Rescale SINR" step, a diamond shape checks if "red com Werage WB-SINR >= requested SINR EvalNu". If the condition in this diamond is true, the flow moves to a diamond shape that checks "Code Rate <= 0.95". If the condition in the "Code Rate <= 0.95" diamond is true, the flow proceeds to a rectangle labeled "rmMaxNumPrbUI = rmEvalNumPbUl". From this rectangle, the flow leads to a rounded rectangle labeled "End Bandwidth selection". If the condition in the "Code Rate <= 0.95" diamond is false, the flow also leads to the "End Bandwidth selection" rounded rectangle. If the condition in the diamond "red com Werage WB-SINR >= requested SINR EvalNu" is false, the flow also leads to the "End Bandwidth selection" rounded rectangle. The flowchart uses standard symbols: rounded rectangles for start/end, diamonds for decisions, and rectangles for processes. The text within the shapes describes the steps and conditions of the bandwidth selection algorithm.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_7706.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] Figure: Adaptive UL Transmission Bandwidth selection for power limited UEs File: Drawings for 5GC000517_5GC001796_ DLLA_and_ULLA.vsdx Folder:

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-13**  (ID: `11132149`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation SINR expiry timer

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-13.0-5**  (ID: `13136353`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If the gNB doesn’t receive a UL transmission for a certain period (rdSinrExpiryTime - see 5G_L2_1029_replaced([11186254](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274Hf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for basic reliability LA and R&D parameter rdSinrExpiryTimeHR (see 5G_UP_ALG_16856_replaced([11138651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krgj6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for high reliability LA and hence the corresponding timer is expired or after FR1 SCell activation:

 [Before CNI-137616-C] If the R&D parameter rdForceMcs0Prb3WhenLaSinrExpiry (see 5G_L2_3621_replaced([11185213](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wLrvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1 to avoid jumps of the allocated PRB number in cell edge conditions:

 MCS index equal to MCS0 if UE is not scheduled with qamLowSE-Index table **or the smallest MCS which makes its TBS based on its MCS/PRB combination be greater than or equal to rdUlMinTbs ([11209054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwxeZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if UE is scheduled with qam64LowSE-Index table shall be sent to UL scheduler.**

 The number of PRBs shall be set to **3.**

 Otherwise: [End CNI-137616-C]

 The default MCS (NRCELL.ullaIniMcs) for basic reliability LA and NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaIniMcsHR for high reliability LA shall be sent to the UL scheduler

 The number of PRBs shall be set to the number of PRBs available for PUSCH in the particular bandwidth system (rrmMaxNumPuschPrb).

The minimal PRB allowed for DRB priority PUG when UE works in high reliability is rdMinPRBsAllocForDrbPriorityPugHR (refer [11209690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw1IyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [Before CNI-137616-C] regardless of rdForceMcs0Prb3WhenLaSinrExpiry setting [End CNI-137616-C] except adaptive retransmission. please refer 5G_UP_ALG_32367_replaced([11199477](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwOEwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note that there is a deviation between SW and the above specification (related to change of number of PRBs with SW pronto PR591735). Thus, a workaround has been introduced for the following special scenario:

 CFRA ongoing (ongoing is reduced to the capability to receive a CRC OK for the PUSCH associated to the RAR or the RA-Msg3 reTx).

 For UL grant scheduled by Msg2 and all its ReTX, only DTX is received

 Pro-active UL scheduling is started even CFRA has not been successfully from gNB pov

If PRB allocated by FDM scheduler is not smaller than 3   
MCS0 and 3 PRBs.   
Else  
No change for PRB allocation, while MCS is set to the minimal value which can fulfill the TBS given by min (rdUlMinTbs, NRCELL/ulMinTbs).  
Endif

During the NSA contention resolution, the ATB shall restrict the PRB allocation to rrmMinPuschPrb (5G_UP_ALG_31765_replaced([11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**.**

In case of SA the handling of the next UL transmission after Msg3 is described in requirement 5G_UP_ALG_3096_replaced([11131242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krCCwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Finally, the selected MCS (rrmUlProposedMcs) and the maximum number of xPUSCH PRBs (rrmMaxNumPrbUl) shall be made available to the UL scheduler.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-14**  (ID: `11132172`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation MCS calculation for short-term rank computation

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-1.0-14.0-1**  (ID: `11132178`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If NRCELL.ulSuMimoEnh.enhRankSelectSe is set to True [PR829702-25R3] and UE is not in Transform Precoder Enabled State ( [11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))[End PR829702-25R3], gNB-DU shall perform the steps defined in this requirement for the Spectral Effeciency (SE) check required to compute the Short Term (ST) rank in 5G_UP_ALG_30873_replaced([11139935](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq78_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Step 1: Calculate the rrmInstSinrRank1 and rrmInstSinrRank2 as per 5G_UP_ALG_30873_replaced([11139935](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq78_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Step 2: Calculate rrmSinrCorrection as per 5G_UP_ALG_9935_replaced([11130229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mgvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Same value of rrmSinrCorrection shall be used for both ranks.

Step 3: Calculate rrmCorrSinr for both ranks as following.

 rrmCorrSinrRank1 = rrmInstSinrRank1 + rrmSinrCorrection + rrmDeltaSinr + MPR + DeltaMPR256QAM

 rrmCorrSinrRank2 = rrmInstSinrRank2 + rrmSinrCorrection + rrmDeltaSinr + MPR + DeltaMPR256QAM

**[CB013202-B-UPD002]Note: rrmCorrSinr shall be calculated as given in 5G_UP_ALG_9935_replaced([11130229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mgvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). MPR and DeltaMPR256QAM values shall be set as per 5G_UP_ALG_17281_replaced([11131699](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmDeltaSinr shall be calculated as per 5G_UP_ALG_11058_replaced([11137940](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krcSfvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**[End CB013202-B-UPD002]****

Step 4: For each rank, MCS selection procedure as defined in **[Before CB013202-B-UPD002]5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**[CB013202-B-UPD002]5G_UP_ALG_17280_replaced([11131696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**[End CB013202-B-UPD002] shall be followed. Input is rrmCorrSinrRank1 and rrmCorrSinrRank2 instead of rrmCorrAvgSinr.** ****

 rrmSinrRecorrection (for each rank) depends on the rrmEvalNumPrb (5G_UP_ALG_17271_replaced([11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) during the MCS selection. 

 rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr (for each rank) is negatively offset by the MPR and DeltaMPR256QAM which may be different for each rank due to different number of PRBs and modulation order.

**[CB013202-B-UPD002]Note: For MCS selection in this step, number of PRB may be equal to SRS PRBs or PUSCH PRBs depending on the configuration of aperiodic SRS as given in 5G_UP_ALG_10497_replaced([11119432](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqKgE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**[End CB013202-B-UPD002]****

Step 5: Calculate the SE values of the predicted MCSs in Step 4 from the respective MCS index table (Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4641_replaced([11192432](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the corresponding MCS index table). gNB-DU shall calculate the output of MCS prediction algorithm as following.

 SE_3GPP_Table(predicted_mcs_rank1) = SE value for MCS predicted for Rank1.

 SE_3GPP_Table(predicted_mcs_rank2) = SE value for MCS predicted for Rank2.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11132185`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation SINR to MCS mapping tables

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12522519`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Separate SINR to MCS mapping tables are specified for rank1 and rank2 transmissions in UL, and for the system bandwidth of [Before CB009173-B]below 6GHz and above 6GHz[CB009173-B]FR1 and FR2[End CB009173-B]. These tables represent the required SINR, which shall be used by the link adaptation, for selecting the most suited MCS.

The appropriate table for the SINR to MCS mapping is selected depending on the rank proposed by the UL SU-MIMO feature. The rank can change on slot basis.

Furthermore, the selection of the mapping tables for FR1 or FR2 shall be decided by evaluating the ulBandwidth used for the link adaptation. The mapping of system bandwidth in UL to the corresponding maximum number of PRBs available for the data transmission on PUSCH can be found in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2029_replaced([11277080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpLfx_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Following configurations shall be supported:

  * TDD FR1: [CB009173-B] 24, 38 [End CB009173-B], 51, [CB009173-B] 78, [End CB009173-B]106, 133, 162, [CB009173-B] 189, [End CB009173-B]217, [CB009173-B] 245 [End CB009173-B] and 273 PRBs
  * TDD FR2: 32 and 66 PRBs
  * FDD: 25, 52, 79, 106,[CB009173-B] 133, [End CB009173-B] 160 [CB009173-B] 188 [End CB009173-B] [Before CB009173-B] and [End CB009173-B] 216 [CB009173-B] and 270 [End CB009173-B] PRBs



Note: The R&D parameter rd425abActivated (see 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2029_replaced([11277080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpLfx_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L3_4658) shall be configuered in such a way that the 64/256PRB configurations are excluded.

Editor's note: Both maximum PRB allocations, the maximum PRB allocation of 64/256PRB and the maximum PRB of 66/273PRB, are supported by the gNB. Which one of the implemented maximum PRB allocations shall be applied is selected by the R&D parameter rd425abActivated. Further details with respect to the R&D parameter rd425abActivated can be found in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2029_replaced([11277080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpLfx_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L3_4658.

The tables corresponding to Rank1 transmissions shall be applied as well for the SINR to MCS mapping if the UE in scheduling supports only the singleTx mode in UL (maxNumOfUlLayer = 1 – see 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2819_replaced([11307858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrAEt_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For FDD, the following requiredSinr values for ATB base on the averaged required SINR from 5Gmax of 5G19 (12 OFDM symbols, 1 and 2 DMRS, post equalized SINR). Missing simulation values are interpolated between neighbour values. For used PRB sizes, see 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
reqSinr \ numPRB | 3 | 4 | 8 | 14 | 16 | 24 | 32 | 48 | 64  
Note: in 5G19A, there is no differentiation between PTRS ON and OFF |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
required SINR [dB] for PTRS OFF, all BW. | -3.38 | -3.91 | -4.68 | -4.85 | -4.91 | -5.24 | -5.31 | -5.39 | -5.42  
  
For FDD UL, the tables for the case {12 PUSCH symbols, 1 DMRS symbol} are reused for the case {13 PUSCH symbols, 2 DMRS symbols}.

The tables for the case {13 PUSCH symbols, 1 DMRS symbol} are reused for the case {14 PUSCH symbols, 2 DMRS symbols}.

Editor's note: The required SINR provided in the following mapping tables corresponds to the post-equalizer SINR.

The SINR to MCS mapping tables are defined in a simplified way regardless of the number of PUSCH- and DMRS-symbols, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3113_replaced([11132208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CB009173-B]

Note: The supported configurations corrected and aligned with 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2029_replaced([11277080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpLfx_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) requirement. This note should not be inherited for next requirement of 26R2:

[End CB009173-B]

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3**  (ID: `11132202`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Simplified SINR to MCS mapping tables

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11132208`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation General description of UL Mapping tables

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `13461102`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation For the required SINR to MCS Mapping, tables are defined per PTRS setting and Rank combinations. Each table includes the required SINR values, used for Link Adaptation of the full channel Bandwidth as well as used for ATB as well as used for FDM. These tables are regardless of the number of PUSCH OFDM symbols and the number of DMRS symbols.

In detail, for

  * ATB (LA of power limited UE): Particular numPRB are valid, but only for MCS0 or using a corresponding MCS depending on rrmMaxNumPrbULATB if UE is scheduled with qam64LowSE-Index table) (The ATB procedure and its possible PRB allocations are specified with 5G_UP_ALG_3090_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
  * LA: Only the PRB allocations of Full channel Bandwidth (example for TDD FR1: 51/106/133/162/217/273PRB for 20/40/50/60/80/100MHz) are valid for all MCS indexes.
  * Hint: Tables for TDD FR1 are already prepared for 133 PRB which is not used by LA in 5G19B.
  * FDM: The complete table is valid for FDM including ATB and LA part. For details see below in this requirement.
  * For any other full channel bandwidths not listed above, if the number of PRBs allocated to the UE is not in the LA table, the required SINR values shall be obtained by linear interpolation using the available values.



The required SINR values based on 5Gmax simulations for 10% BLER and real channel estimations, using the measured SINR after Post Equallizer combining.

The input data from 5Gmax simulations can be found at this 5GMax sharepoint link:

[https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5gmax/Shared%20Documents/Forms/AllItems.aspx?csf=1&e=i6r6vI&cid=ee597ba7%2D7118%2D42c5%2Da51f%2D8153406e31bd&RootFolder=%2Fsites%2F5gmax%2FShared%20Documents%2FSimulationReports%2FNR%2FInternalCustomer%2FLUT%20for%20LA&FolderCTID=0x0120005835DA4A693F4F459973F25EDCB28D07](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5gmax/Shared%20Documents/Forms/AllItems.aspx?csf=1&e=i6r6vI&cid=ee597ba7%2D7118%2D42c5%2Da51f%2D8153406e31bd&RootFolder=%2Fsites%2F5gmax%2FShared%20Documents%2FSimulationReports%2FNR%2FInternalCustomer%2FLUT%20for%20LA&FolderCTID=0x0120005835DA4A693F4F459973F25EDCB28D07)

The evaluation of the 5Gmax simulation results and its conversion to the mapping table format used in this requirement can be found at this sharepoint link:

[https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?csf=1&e=t7mP7d&cid=149f8753%2Df981%2D4a23%2Da3ef%2D6cce47860b9a&FolderCTID=0x012000F0A0A3BA325F7648AD307E6959BA7376&id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2F5G%20Architecture%20documents%2F5G%20NR%20CQI%20Tables%2FCFAM1796%2DE%20McsMappingTables&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?csf=1&e=t7mP7d&cid=149f8753%2Df981%2D4a23%2Da3ef%2D6cce47860b9a&FolderCTID=0x012000F0A0A3BA325F7648AD307E6959BA7376&id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2F5G%20Architecture%20documents%2F5G%20NR%20CQI%20Tables%2FCFAM1796%2DE%20McsMappingTables&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c)

If NIDD NRCELL.actUlOptMcsSelection is False

\- If a column for the number of PRBs allocated to the UE is not in the LA table, the required SINR values shall be obtained by linear interpolation using the available values.

For example, if 10 PRBs are allocated to the UE, the values for 8 and 16 PRBs are used to interpolate the required SINR values for 10 PRBs.

Else **(i.e. NIDD NRCELL.actUlOptMcsSelection is True**)****

\- A single PRB number defined by R&D parameter rdUlPRBMcsSelection (defined in 5G_UP_ALG_29013_replaced([11138989](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjnNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in each SINR-to-MCS mapping table for FR1( FR1 FDD and FR1 TDD) shall be used irrespective of the actually assigned number of PRBs. This eliminates the need for interpolation and changing the MCS based on exact allocated PRBs.

For the definition of the tables, please refer to the following requirements:

  * SINR to MCS Mapping Tables for CP-OFDM:

When NRCELL.actIrcRddDebiasing is set to TRUE:

**\- If NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is 8RX OR rdSuUeReceiverSize (5G_UP_ALG_27595_replaced([11114156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 8, **then gNB-DU shall apply sinr offset rdIrcRddDebiasingSinrOffset (see 5G_UP_ALG_31212_replaced([11139019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjnOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to 8RX UL LA LUTs.****

If NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is 16RX and rdSuUeReceiverSize (5G_UP_ALG_27595_replaced([11114156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 16, then gNB-DU shall apply sinr offset rd16RxIrcSinrOffset (see 5G_UP_ALG_32506_replaced([11139037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krkOQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to 16RX UL LA LUTs.

  6. For Thor L1 Variant

  10. 5G_UP_ALG_21018_replaced([11135066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krO3GvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD, FR1, 64QAMLowSE-Index table for ABIP/Thor L1 variant with 10% BLER.

  12. 5G_UP_ALG_11552_replaced([11136689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krVkzPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, 64QAM-Index table for ABIP/Thor L1 variant with 10% BLER.
  13. 5G_UP_ALG_21140_replaced([11136834](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krWy4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, 64QAM-Index table for ABIP/Thor L1 variant with 1% BLER.
  14. 5G_UP_ALG_11551_replaced([11136847](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krWy5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, 256QAM-Index table for ABIP/Thor L1 variant with 10% BLER.
  15. 5G_UP_ALG_21151_replaced([11136985](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krXZ_fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, 64QAMLowSE-Index table for ABIP/Thor L1 variant with 10% BLER.
  16. 5G_UP_ALG_21153_replaced([11137000](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krYBAvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, 64QAMLowSE-Index table for ABIP/Thor L1 variant with 1% BLER.
  17. For TDD FR2
  18. 5G_UP_ALG_3125_replaced([11135681](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krRTW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD, FR2, 64QAM-Index table
  19. 5G_UP_ALG_23070_replaced([11135825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krR6bvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD FR2, 64QAM for ABIP**with 10% BLER**

  20. For DFT-s-OFDM (Transform Precoder)

  21. For ABIL
     1. 5G_UP_ALG_16634_replaced([11218398](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxkIl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD, FR1, ABIL
     2. 5G_UP_ALG_3143_replaced([11137358](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krZPK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, FR1, ABIL
  22. For Loki H/W Variant
     1. If NRCELL/actPuschPostEqSinrCompensation = False
        1. 5G_UP_ALG_3139_replaced([11137034](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krYBCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD, FR1, ABIO
        2. 5G_UP_ALG_3141_replaced([11137206](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krYoHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, FR1, ABIO
     2. If NRCELL/actPuschPostEqSinrCompensation = True
        1. [12565020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_AgiMsCt4EfCNjfqfyUlvmw) for Comp SINR to MCS Tables for TP, TDD FR1 and Loki
        2. [12567165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_x-VFdCxREfCRMdP0Nuo3Hg) for Comp SINR to MCS Tables for TP, FDD FR1 and Loki
  23. For Thor L1 Variant
  24. 5G_UP_ALG_11669_replaced([11137488](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krZ2PPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD, FR1, ABIP
  25. 5G_UP_ALG_11670_replaced([11137689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krbEU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD, FR1, ABIP



Notes:

  * ABIP and ABIQ are both Thor platforms and share same L1 algorithms, so ABIQ share the same LuTs with ABIP.
  * ASOF is a Loki platform, and it is the same to ABIN/ABIO from L1 point of view, so ASOF share the same LuTs with ABIN/ABIO.
  * TDD FR1 tables reused for FDD ([CB008577-A] note including 8Rx [End CB008577-A]) equivalents [Before CB008577-A] with Loki HW variant [End CB008577-A], as detailed 5GMAx simulations not available and results are expected to be close:
  * 64QAM LowSE-Index table with 10% BLER
  * 64QAM LowSE-Index table with 1% BLER
  * 64QAM-Index table with 1% BLER [CB008577-A] This note does not need to be shown in the next release, actually FDD use TDD tables for the above 3 according to detailed req in this chapter, regardless of HW variant [End CB008577-A]
  * Comp SINR means post-equalised SINR compensated by L1 to correct inaccuracies for Loki H/W variants
  * For shorter reference: PUSCH DFT-s-OFDM = TP
  * TP On = UE is configured at RRC layer for PUSCH Transform Precoder for DCI 0_1
  * TP Off = UE is NOT configured at RRC layer for PUSCH Transform Precoder (CP OFDM) for DCI 0_1

In order to change the required SINR values for 256QAM MCSs (MCS20,MCS21...MCS27 from 256QAM table), a sinrDelta is aplied to values from these tables; the sinrDelta is given by the R&D parameter correspondent to each 256QAM MCS (rdMcs20UlRequiredSinrDelta, rdMcs21UlRequiredSinrDelta...rdMcs27UlRequiredSinrDelta (see 5G_L2_3356_replaced([11186114](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gYvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) … 5G_L2_3363_replaced([11186152](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gafvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))).

Note: Tables were simulated for 2Tx 4Rx but are applicable to 2Rx cases as well as 1 Tx cases.

[End CB013204-A]

Bold-Italic: adjusted

In order to change the required SINR values for 256QAM MCSs (MCS20,MCS21...MCS27 from 256QAM table), a sinrDelta is aplied to values from these tables; the sinrDelta is given by the R&D parameter correspondent to each 256QAM MCS (rdMcs20UlRequiredSinrDelta, rdMcs21UlRequiredSinrDelta...rdMcs27UlRequiredSinrDelta (see 5G_L2_3356_replaced([11186114](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gYvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) … 5G_L2_3363_replaced([11186152](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gafvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))).

Note: Tables were simulated for 2Tx 4Rx but are applicable to 2Rx cases as well as 1 Tx cases.

For UEs in singleTx mode the 'Rank1 2Tx 2Rx' mapping tables shall be used for the MCS selection even if the mapping tables base on a different antenna setup. Table 3.1 shall be used if PTRS off is configured and Table 3.3 shall be used if PTRS on is configured.

In order to change the required SINR values for 256QAM MCSs (MCS20,MCS21...MCS27 from 256QAM table), a sinrDelta is applied to values from these tables; the sinrDelta is given by the R&D parameter correspondent to each 256QAM MCS (rdMcs20UlRequiredSinrDelta, rdMcs21UlRequiredSinrDelta...rdMcs27UlRequiredSinrDelta (see 5G_L2_3356_replaced([11186114](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gYvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) … 5G_L2_3363_replaced([11186152](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gafvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))).

Note: Tables were simulated for 2Tx 4Rx but are applicable to 2Rx cases as well as 1 Tx cases.

[CB013712-A] Not valid for NewFR1 [End CB013712-A]

27 | _31.4_ | _30.6_ | 30.0 | 29.9 | 29.4 | 27.6 | 27.4 | 26.8 | 27.2  
  
Bold-Italic: adjusted

_Italic values in the table are interpolated._

In order to change the required SINR values for 256QAM MCSs (MCS20,MCS21...MCS27 from 256QAM table), a sinrDelta is aplied to values from these tables; the sinrDelta is given by the R&D parameter correspondent to each 256QAM MCS (rdMcs20UlRequiredSinrDelta, rdMcs21UlRequiredSinrDelta...rdMcs27UlRequiredSinrDelta (see 5G_L2_3356_replaced([11186114](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gYvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) … 5G_L2_3363_replaced([11186152](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gafvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))).

Note: Tables were simulated for 2Tx 4Rx but are applicable to 2Rx cases as well as 1 Tx cases.

[CB013712-A] Not valid for NewFR1 [End CB013712-A]

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-3.0-25**  (ID: `11136183`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Simplified SINR to MCS mapping table for FDD, 64QAM LowSE with 10% BLER for ABIL for Basic Reliability

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-3.0-25.0-3**  (ID: `13461507`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation There is no simulation results available for FDD, 64QAM LowSE with 10% BLER for ABIL for basic reliability.

TDD results can be reused for FDD as the difference will be minor.

Please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_16034_replaced([11132566](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krG7QfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as reference to be reused.

Please note that the maximum PRBs for FDD is 106. If a column for the number of PRBs allocated to the UE is not in the LA table, the required SINR values shall be obtained by liner interpolation. For example, for 106 PRB, the values for 64PRB and 273PRB are used to interpolate the required SINR values.

[CB013712-A] Not valid for NewFR1 [End CB013712-A]

---

Please note that the maximum PRBs for FDD is 106 If a column for the number of PRBs allocated to the UE is not in the LA table, the required SINR values shall be obtained by liner interpolation. For example, for 106 PRB, the values for 64PRB and 273PRB are used to interpolate the required SINR values.

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-3.0-28**  (ID: `11136414`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Simplified SINR to MCS mapping table for FDD FR1, 64QAM with 1% BLER for ABIO for High Reliability

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-3.0-28.0-1**  (ID: `11136418`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation There is no simulation results available for FDD, 64QAM with 1% BLER for ABIO for High reliability.

TDD results can be reused for FDD as the difference will be minor.

Please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_15583_replaced([11133148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krIJY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as reference to be reused.

In order to change the required SINR values for 256QAM MCSs (MCS20,MCS21...MCS27 from 256QAM table), a sinrDelta is aplied to values from these tables; the sinrDelta is given by the R&D parameter correspondent to each 256QAM MCS (rdMcs20UlRequiredSinrDelta, rdMcs21UlRequiredSinrDelta...rdMcs27UlRequiredSinrDelta (see 5G_L2_3356_replaced([11186114](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gYvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) … 5G_L2_3363_replaced([11186152](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_273gafvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))).

Note: Tables were simulated for 2Tx 4Rx but are applicable to 2Rx cases as well as 1 Tx cases.

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-3.0-30**  (ID: `11136608`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Simplified SINR to MCS mapping table for FDD, 64QAM LowSE with 10% BLER for ABIO for Basic Reliability

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-3.0-30.0-2**  (ID: `11136620`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation There is no simulation results available for FDD, 64QAM LowSE with 10% BLER for ABIO for basic reliability.

TDD results can be reused for FDD as the difference will be minor.

Please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_16036_replaced([11133517](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krJXg_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as reference to be reused.

[Before CB008935-A] Please note that the maximum PRBs for FDD is 216 [End CB008935-A]. If a column for the number of PRBs allocated to the UE is not in the LA table, the required SINR values shall be obtained by liner interpolation. For example, for 216 PRB, the values for 64PRB and 273PRB are used to interpolate the required SINR values.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-3.0-34.0-2**  (ID: `11136843`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation There is no simulation results available for FDD, 64QAM with 1% BLER for ABIP for high reliability.

TDD results can be reused for FDD as the difference will be minor.

Please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_21129_replaced([11134380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krMa0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as reference to be reused.

[Before CB008935-A] Please note that the maximum PRBs for FDD is 216 [End CB008935-A]. If a column for the number of PRBs allocated to the UE is not in the LA table, the required SINR values shall be obtained by liner interpolation. For example, for 216 PRB, the values for 64PRB and 273PRB are used to interpolate the required SINR values.

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-3.0-36.0-2**  (ID: `11136997`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation There is no simulation results available for FDD, 64QAM LowSE with 10% BLER for ABIP for basic reliability.

TDD results can be reused for FDD as the difference will be minor.

Please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_21018_replaced([11135066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krO3GvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as reference to be reused.

[Before CB008935-A] Please note that the maximum PRBs for FDD is 216 [End CB008935-A]. If a column for the number of PRBs allocated to the UE is not in the LA table, the required SINR values shall be obtained by liner interpolation. For example, for 216 PRB, the values for 64PRB and 273PRB are used to interpolate the required SINR values.

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11137039`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 5GMax Simulation Configuration

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-5.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11137054`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11137054: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If configuration is for TDD FR1, and UE is configured for Transform Precoder (see 5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the 5G-L2-PS shall determine the SINR required for a given MCS from the corresponding SINR to MCS mapping table below:

Notes:

 Per 3GPP, only Rank 1 is supported when UE is using DFT-S-OFDM

 Only 64QAM MCS table (38.214 Table 6.1.4.1-1) is supported with DFT-S-OFDM. For MCS0…1, either QPSK or pi/2-BPSK is supported based on "transPrecodePi2Bpsk" field in PsCell_CellSetupReq (to be reviewed)

 Number of allocated PRBs: must be of the form [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression: $2^{a_2} \cdot 3^{a_3} \cdot 5^{a_5}$. The expression consists of three terms multiplied together. Each term is a base number raised to a power. The bases are 2, 3, and 5, and their respective exponents are denoted by $a_2$, $a_3$, and $a_5$. The multiplication is indicated by the dot symbol ($\cdot$).[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_8172.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] , where a2,a3, and a5 are non-negative integers

 SINR from tables is used for Link Adaptation, ATB, and FDM.

 Tables apply for all number of PUSCH OFDM symbols, number of DMRS symbols.

 If a column for number of PRBs is not in the table, then required SINR is derived from linear interpolation.

5GMax Simulation Configuration:

  * Channel: AWGN

  * Carrier Freq.: 3.5GHz

  * Antennae: 2Tx/2Rx

  * BW: 100 MHz

  * Number of OFDM Data Symbols: 14

  * Number of DMRS Symbols: 1

  * Number of CDM Groups w/o data: 2

  * Rank: Rank1

  * Slot Format: DMRS Type1, Mapping TypeB, AllocSym[0:13]




[Before CB013204-A]

Note SINR table used for Transform Precoder has dummy 2 PRB column even no 2 PRB column defined in the SINR to MCS mapping table. And the dummy 2 PRB column value in SW for TP is just copied from 3 PRB column. It seems that SW team has intended to keep a dummy 2 PRB column (copied from 3 PRB column) for TP SINR table in SW to simplify the SW implementation.

[End CB013204-A]

---

---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
MCS | numPRB |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 8 | 16 | 64 | 128 | 270 |   
pi/2 BPSK (q=1) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
0 | 1.3 | 0.3 | -3.8 | -4.1 | -5.0 | -5.3 | -5.6 | -5.7 | -5.8

It is due to too high PTRS overhead with 1 PRB, then if PTRS is present for 1 PRB with sample density configuration, minimal scheduled PRB is 2 according to 5G_UP_ALG_6845_replaced([11197403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwHXIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB013204-A]

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-5.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11137219`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11137219: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If configuration is for FDD (for Loki), and UE is configured for Transform Precoder (see 5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the 5G-L2-PS shall determine the SINR required for a given MCS from the corresponding SINR to MCS mapping table below:

Notes:

For a General description of UL Mapping tables, please see requirement 5G_UP_ALG_3113_replaced([11132208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

\- Per 3GPP, only Rank 1 is supported when UE is using DFT-S-OFDM

\- Only 64QAM MCS table (38.214 Table 6.1.4.1-1) is supported with DFT-S-OFDM. For MCS0…1, either QPSK or pi/2-BPSK is supported based on "transPrecodePi2Bpsk" field in PsCell_CellSetupReq (to be reviewed)

\- Number of allocated PRBs: must be of the form [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression: $2^{a_1} \cdot 3^{a_2} \cdot 5^{a_3}$. The expression consists of three terms multiplied together. The first term is 2 raised to the power of $a_1$. The second term is 3 raised to the power of $a_2$. The third term is 5 raised to the power of $a_3$. The multiplication is indicated by the dot symbol between the terms.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_8189.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] , where a2,a3, and a5 are non-negative integers

\- If a column for number of PRBs is not in the table, then required SINR is derived from linear interpolation.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-5.0-4.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13461624`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 13461624: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If configuration is for FDD, and UE is configured for Transform Precoder (see 5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the 5G-L2-PS shall determine the SINR required for a given MCS from the corresponding SINR to MCS mapping table below:

Notes:

 Per 3GPP, only Rank 1 is supported when UE is using DFT-S-OFDM

 Only 64QAM MCS table (38.214 Table 6.1.4.1-1) is supported with DFT-S-OFDM. For MCS0…1, either QPSK or pi/2-BPSK is supported based on "transPrecodePi2Bpsk" field in PsCell_CellSetupReq (to be reviewed)

 Number of allocated PRBs: must be of the form [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression written in black text on a white background. The expression is: 2^a * 3^a * 5^a. The exponents are small and raised to the right of the base numbers. The multiplication symbols are represented by dots.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_8203.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] , where a2,a3, and a5 are non-negative integers

 SINR from tables is used for Link Adaptation, ATB, and FDM.

 Tables apply for all number of PUSCH OFDM symbols, number of DMRS symbols.

 If a column for number of PRBs is not in the table, then required SINR is derived from linear interpolation.

 **This requirement is applicable only for Loner L1 HW.**

5GMax Simulation Configuration:

  * Channel: AWGN

  * Carrier Freq.: 0.7 GHz

  * Antennae: 2Tx/4Rx

  * BW: 20 MHz

  * Number of OFDM Data Symbols: 12

  * Number of DMRS Symbols: 2

  * Number of CDM Groups w/o data: 2

  * Rank: Rank1

  * Slot Format: DMRS Type1, Mapping TypeB, AllocSym[0:13]




[CB013712-A] Not valid for NewFR1 [End CB013712-A]

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11137457: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation [Before CNI-103796-M] If configuration is for TDD FR1, and UE is configured for Transform Precoder (see 5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the 5G-L2-PS shall determine the SINR required for a given MCS from the corresponding SINR to MCS mapping table below:

Notes:

 Per 3GPP, only Rank 1 is supported when UE is using DFT-S-OFDM

 Only 64QAM MCS table (38.214 Table 6.1.4.1-1) is supported with DFT-S-OFDM. For MCS0…1, either QPSK or pi/2-BPSK is supported based on "transPrecodePi2Bpsk" field in PsCell_CellSetupReq (to be reviewed)

 Number of allocated PRBs: must be of the form [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression: $2^{a_2} \cdot 3^{a_3} \cdot 5^{a_5}$. The expression consists of three terms multiplied together. Each term is a base number raised to a power. The bases are 2, 3, and 5, and their respective exponents are denoted by $a_2$, $a_3$, and $a_5$. The multiplication is indicated by the dot symbol ($\cdot$).[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_8213.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] , where a2,a3, and a5 are non-negative integers

 SINR from tables is used for Link Adaptation, ATB, and FDM.

 Tables apply for all number of PUSCH OFDM symbols, number of DMRS symbols.

 If a column for number of PRBs is not in the table, then required SINR is derived from linear interpolation.

5GMax Simulation Configuration:

  * Channel: AWGN

  * Carrier Freq.: 3.5GHz

  * Antennae: 1Tx/2Rx

  * BW: 100 MHz

  * Number of OFDM Data Symbols: 14

  * Number of DMRS Symbols: 1

  * Number of CDM Groups w/o data: 2

  * Rank: Rank1

  * Slot Format: DMRS Type1, Mapping TypeB, AllocSym[0:13]




[End CNI-103796-M]

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-5.0-6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11137499`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11137499: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If configuration is for TDD FR1, and UE is configured for Transform Precoder (see 5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the 5G-L2-PS shall determine the SINR required for a given MCS from the corresponding SINR to MCS mapping table below:

Notes:

 Per 3GPP, only Rank 1 is supported when UE is using DFT-S-OFDM

 Only 64QAM MCS table (38.214 Table 6.1.4.1-1) is supported with DFT-S-OFDM. For MCS0…1, either QPSK or pi/2-BPSK is supported based on "transPrecodePi2Bpsk" field in PsCell_CellSetupReq (to be reviewed)

 Number of allocated PRBs: must be of the form [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression: $2^{a_2} \cdot 3^{a_3} \cdot 5^{a_5}$. The expression consists of three terms multiplied together. Each term is a base number raised to a power. The bases are 2, 3, and 5, and their respective exponents are denoted by $a_2$, $a_3$, and $a_5$. The multiplication is indicated by the dot symbol ($\cdot$).[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_8219.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] , where a2,a3, and a5 are non-negative integers

 SINR from tables is used for Link Adaptation, ATB, and FDM.

 Tables apply for all number of PUSCH OFDM symbols, number of DMRS symbols.

 If a column for number of PRBs is not in the table, then required SINR is derived from linear interpolation.

5GMax Simulation Configuration:

  * Channel: AWGN

  * Carrier Freq.: 3.5GHz

  * BW: 100 MHz

  * SCS: 30 KHz

  * Number of OFDM Data Symbols: 12

  * Number of CDM Groups w/o data: 2

  * Rank: Rank1

  * Slot Format: DMRS Type1, Mapping TypeB, AllocSym[0:13]

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-5.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11137693`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 5GMax Simulation Configuration

---

**3.8.3.1.0-7.0-3.0-5.0-7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11137703`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation 11137703: Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation If configuration is for FDD (for Loki), and UE is configured for Transform Precoder (see 5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the 5G-L2-PS shall determine the SINR required for a given MCS from the corresponding SINR to MCS mapping table below:

Notes:

For a General description of UL Mapping tables, please see requirement 5G_UP_ALG_3113_replaced([11132208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

\- Per 3GPP, only Rank 1 is supported when UE is using DFT-S-OFDM

\- Only 64QAM MCS table (38.214 Table 6.1.4.1-1) is supported with DFT-S-OFDM. For MCS0…1, either QPSK or pi/2-BPSK is supported based on "transPrecodePi2Bpsk" field in PsCell_CellSetupReq (to be reviewed)

\- Number of allocated PRBs: must be of the form [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression: $2^{a_1} \cdot 3^{a_2} \cdot 5^{a_3}$. The expression consists of three terms multiplied together. The first term is 2 raised to the power of $a_1$. The second term is 3 raised to the power of $a_2$. The third term is 5 raised to the power of $a_3$. The multiplication is indicated by the dot symbol between the terms.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_8239.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] , where a2,a3, and a5 are non-negative integers

\- If a column for number of PRBs is not in the table, then required SINR is derived from linear interpolation.

5GMax Simulation Configuration:

  * Channel: AWGN

  * Carrier Freq.: 3.5GHz

  * Antennae: 2Tx/4Rx

  * BW: 100 MHz

  * SCS: 30 KHz

  * Number of OFDM Data Symbols: 12

  * Number of CDM Groups w/o data: 2

  * Rank: Rank1

  * Slot Format: DMRS Type1, Mapping TypeB, AllocSym[0:13]

---

#### 3.8.3.1.0-8 Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation MCS Re-determination (ID: 11137774)

**3.8.3.1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11137777`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation **Selection Logic for Limited UL MCS Downgrade for Basic Reliability and UL MCS Downgrade Enhanced function for High Reliability**

---

**3.8.3.1.0-8.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11137797`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Logic for determining activation of “No UL MCS downgrade”, “Full UL MCS Downgrade (01841590)” or “Limited UL MCS downgrade (PR599709)” [CB008246-O]for Basic Reliability and Logic for determining activation of “No UL MCS downgrade”, and "UL MCS Downgrade Enhanced" for High Reliability [End CB008246-O] is as follows.

[CB008246-O]For Basic Reliability[End CB008246-O]

IF ( NRCELL.actMcsPrbReductionFdmUl == 0)

{

No UL MCS Downgrade [CB008246-O]for Basic Reliability [End CB008246-O]; /* 01841590 and 599709 deactivated

}

ELSE /* here we are doing an UL MCS downgrade

{

/* I.e., the MCS step size is set to zero; allow “full UL MCS downgrade”

/* Note that NRCELL.ulMcsDowngradeMaxReduction sets # of MCS steps for “limited” UL MCS downgrade

IF ( NRCELL.ulMcsDowngradeMaxReduction == 0) 

{

Activate full UL MCS downgrade [CB008246-O]for Basic Reliability [End CB008246-O] /* PR01841590 is activated

Deactivate limited UL MCS downgrade [CB008246-O]for Basic Reliability [End CB008246-O] /* PR599709 is deactivated

}

/* Here the MCS step size for 599709 is non-zero; enable “limited” UL MCS downgrade

/* Note that when limited UL MCS downgrade is activated, Ack step size calculation uses the

/* target BLER parameter NRCELL.ulLimitedMcsStepupSizeBler for the for MCS downgrade cases

Else

{

Activate limited UL MCS downgrade [CB008246-O]for Basic Reliability [End CB008246-O] /* PR599709 is activated

Deactivate full UL MCS downgrade [CB008246-O]for Basic Reliability [End CB008246-O] /* PR01841590 is deactivated

}

}

[CB008246-O]For High Reliability

IF ( NRCELL.ulMcsDowngradeForHr == 0) /*disbabled

{

No UL MCS Downgrade for High Reliability; 

}

ELSE /* here we are doing an UL MCS downgrade for High Reliabiility

{

IF ( NRCELL.ulMcsDowngradeForHr == 1) /* enabled

{

Activate Full UL MCS Downgrade for High Reliability (5G_UP_ALG_5102_replaced([11203503](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfKifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))); 

Deactivate UL enhanced Link Adaptation buffer based MCS downgrade for high reliability (i.e., Not compute the special OLLA value for acks of MCS downgrade data initial transmission) (5G_UP_ALG_25848_replaced([11138261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kreHo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) (5G_UP_ALG_25848_replaced([11138261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kreHo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

}

IF ( NRCELL.ulMcsDowngradeForHr == 2) /* enhanced

{

Activate Full UL MCS Downgrade for High Reliability (5G_UP_ALG_5102_replaced([11203503](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfKifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))); 

Activate UL enhanced Link Adaptation buffer based MCS downgrade for high reliability (i.e., Compute the special OLLA value for acks of MCS downgrade data initial transmission and feedback to OLLA) (5G_UP_ALG_25848_replaced([11138261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kreHo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

}

}

[End CB008246-O] 

So using NRCELL.actMcsPrbReductionFdmUl gives one of two options for UL MCS downgrade [CB008246-O]for Basic Reliability [End CB008246-O], “Full” or “Limited” UL MCS downgrade based on the setting of the MCS step size parameter NRCELL.ulMcsDowngradeMaxReduction

When NRCELL.actUlMinTbsForVoNR is set to TRUE, for VoNR users with active 5QI-1 bearer, the MCS downgrade shall follow the rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_5101_replaced([11203496](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfKiPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.8.3.1.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11137803`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation TBS re-calculation due to MCS re-determination

---

**3.8.3.1.0-8.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11137809`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation [CB008246-E-UPD001]When UE is scheduled with Table 5.1.3.1-3 for 64QAM LowSE, TBS re-calculation due to the MCS re-determination shall follow the rules defined in 5G_UP_ALG_15402_replaced([11203355](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwejfvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End CB008246-E-UPD001]

---

#### 3.8.3.1.0-9 Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Adaptive Transmission Bandwidth (ATB) (ID: 11137815)

**3.8.3.1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11137820`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation R&D parameter rdMinUlPrbSinrThreshold

---

**3.8.3.1.0-9.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11137826`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation In FDD mode and if the R&D parameter rdMinUlPrbSinrThreshold (see 5G_L2_1248_replaced([11186280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_274ugPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) has a value which is different from 99:

\- the MCS is forced to 0.

  * if the rescaled corrected average SINR value is below the value set in the rdMinUlPrbSinrThreshold parameter, the number of PRBs granted for any PUSCH scheduled is 3 RBs, otherwise the number of PRBs granted is 8 RBs.

---

#### 3.8.3.1.0-10 Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Determination of the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data for PUSCH (ID: 11137832)

**3.8.3.1.0-10.0-3**  (ID: `11137849`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation if [Before CB012810-D](\(NRCELL.actUlDataDmrsFdm is FALSE\) or \(Transform Precoder enabled \(see 5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced\(\[11140467\]\(https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ\)\)\)\) or \(PUSCH is scheduled by RAR UL grant or DCI 0_0\)) or (NRCELL.actUlMuMimo = True and 'for each MU UE'), [End CB012810-D]one of below condition is met:

\- NRCELL.actUlDataDmrsFdm is FALSE, or

\- Transform Precoder enabled (see 5G_UP_ALG_3270_replaced([11140467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_UPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), or

\- PUSCH is scheduled by RAR UL grant or DCI 0_0), or

\- NRCELL.actUlMuMimo = True and 'for each MU UE', or

\- [CB013204-A] 1 PRB is allocated and rdActUlDataDmrsFdm1Prb (5G_UP_ALG_31961_replaced([11139166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krk1YfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is false, or [End CB013204-A]

[CB012810-D]

\- At least one DRB of UE is configured with DRB priority PUG and UE works in high reliability mode, for each DRB priority proactive UL grant, 

[End CB012810-D]

then:

the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data is 2

else

if (mcs-Table is 64QAM)

if ((28>=MCS>= ulDataDmrsFdmMcsThreshold64QAM) and (the number of layer is no more than 2))

the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data is 1

else

the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data is 2

else if (mcs-Table is 256QAM)

if ((27>=MCS>= ulDataDmrsFdmMcsThreshold256QAM) and (the number of layer is no more than 2))

the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data is 1

else

the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data is 2

else if (mcs-Table is 64QAMLowSE)

if ((28>=MCS>= ulDataDmrsFdmMcsThreshold64QAMLowSE (which is NIDD parameter NRCELL.ulDataDmrsFdm/ulDataDmrsFdmThres64QamLowSEMcs) ) and (the number of layer is no more than 2))

the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data is 1

else

the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data is 2

NOTE: when NRCELL.actUlMuMimo = True, the DMRS FDM on MU UEs (paired UEs) is not allowed, it means the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data shall be 2 for all MU UEs.

---

#### 3.8.3.1.0-11 Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Calculate MCS for power limited UE before FD (ID: 12492826)

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `12472293`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Calculate max MCS for power limited UE before FD

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12472294`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Given a power limited UE and the upper limit of the number of PUSCH PRBs (denoted as rrmMaxNumPuschPrb defined in [11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_kEmOgPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), gNB shall calculate the max eligible MCS for the power limited UE (denoted as MCS_N), the number of PRBs associated with the max eligible MCS (denoted as PRB_N), and the associated rescaled corrected average WB-SINR (denoted as SINR_N) before FD as below. 

[Before CB014045-A-UPD002]Note that the following steps are applied into both FR1 and FR2 except that step 4 is only applicable for FR1.[End CB014045-A-UPD002]

  * step 1. The number of PRBs to make UE from power limited status to non power limited status = value determined as [12492933](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ecQ0QRNIEfCph-OiSyk16Q?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * step 1a. PRB_T = min(max(result of step 1, minimal PRBs for PUSCH transmission), rrmMaxNumPuschPrb)
  * step 2. SINR_T = The rescaled corrected average WB-SINR associated with PRB_T (result of step 1a) is calculated as [11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * step 3. MCS_N = the highest MCS whose required SINR can be satisfied by SINR_T and PRB_T. See [12492829](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_975c0RL5EfCph-OiSyk16Q?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * step 4. If a satisfied MCS is found in step 3 and MCS_N shall be limited according to [12472297](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jzUiUQ3TEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for FR1
  * step 5. If a satisfied MCS is found in step 3, then the number of PRBs associated with the max eligible MCS is updated as below.
  * SINR_Margin = SINR_T - required SINR for MCS_N - MPR(PRB_T) - DeltaMPR256QAM(MCS_N) (see [12492824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-UiGoRL2EfCph-OiSyk16Q?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
  * PRB_N = min(floor(PRB_T * linear(SINR_Margin), rrmMaxNumPuschPrb)
  * [Before CB014045-AB]if MPR(PRB_N) > 0 and MPR(PRB_T) == 0 , then
    * PRB_N = min(floor(PRB_T * linear(SINR_Margin - MPR(PRB_N)), rrmMaxNumPuschPrb)
    * If PRB_N < size of bandwidth specific inner RB area (see [12472295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EuO5oA3TEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), then PRB_N = size of bandwidth specific inner RB area.
  * [CB014045-AB]if MPR(PRB_N) > 0 and MPR(PRB_T) == 0 and "(SINR(rrmMaxNumPuschPrb) - MPR(PRB_N)) < required SINR for (min(rdUlMcsSwitchingPointForPowerLimitedUe, maxMcs))", then
    * PRB_N = Size of bandwidth specific inner RB area (see [12472295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EuO5oA3TEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))[End CB014045-AB]
  * step 6. If a satisfied MCS is NOT found in step 3 [PR862744] OR a valid found MCS in step 3 does not satisfy the rrmMinSupportedPuschTbs defined in [11199457](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)[End PR862744], then
  * PRB_N = [Before PR862744]minimal PRBs for PUSCH transmission (see [11199457](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [PR862744]minSupportedNumPrbsUl (see [12790373](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_5u4DApO_EfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))[End PR862744]
  * MCS_N is the smallest MCS that can make TBS of (the MCS, PRB_N) >= [Before PR846547] NRCELL.ulMinTbs which is the minimal TBS defined in [11199466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [PR846547] rrmMinSupportedPuschTbs defined in [11199457](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [End PR846547].

  * step 7. SINR_N = the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR as [11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) with PRB_N as the to be evaluated the number of PRBs.




Where:

  * MPR(n): Given the number of PUSCH PRBs to be evaluated, gNB shall determine MPR before FD as[12472295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Go7EsQ3TEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)
  * DeltaMPR256QAM shall be determined as [12492824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_APKnUBL3EfCph-OiSyk16Q)
  * linear(x) = 10 ^ (x/10)



[CB014045-AB]

  * Mcs switching point is defined in [13455013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_whbHYCxOEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * SINR(rrmMaxNumPuschPrb) is the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR associated with rrmMaxNumPuschPrb is calculated as [11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * maxMcs represent the highest MCS in the MCS index table used. [End CB014045-AB]

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-2**  (ID: `12492933`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Calculate the number of PRBs to make UE from power limited status to non power limited status

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12492934`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Given a power limited UE, gNB shall calculate the number of PRBs to make UE from power limited status to non power limited status as below

X = floor(linear(rrmPhrScaled[i,j,tPHR] + dB(rrmMaxNumPuschPrb) – rdPhrThreshold))

[Before CB014045-AB]if MPR(X) > 0, then 

  * X = floor(linear(rrmPhrScaled[i,j,tPHR] - MPR(X) + dB(rrmMaxNumPuschPrb) – rdPhrThreshold)).
  * If X < size of bandwidth specific inner RB area, then X = size of bandwidth specific inner RB area.



[CB014045-AB]if MPR(X) > 0 and "( SINR(rrmMaxNumPuschPrb) - MPR(X)) < required SINR for (min(rdUlMcsSwitchingPointForPowerLimitedUe, maxMcs))", then 

  * X = size of bandwidth specific inner RB area.[End CB014045-AB]



X is the number of PRBs to make UE to non power limited status.

Where:

  * rrmPhrScaled[i,j,tPHR], rrmMaxNumPuschPrb, rdPhrThreshold: see [11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * MPR(n) and size of bandwidth specific inner RB area: refer [12472295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Go7EsQ3TEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)
  * dB(x) = 10 * log10(x)
  * linear(x) = 10 ^ (x/10)



[CB014045-AB]

  * SINR(rrmMaxNumPuschPrb) is the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR associated with rrmMaxNumPuschPrb is calculated as [11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * rdUlMcsSwitchingPointForPowerLimitedUe is defined in [13455013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_whbHYCxOEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
  * maxMcs represent the highest MCS in the MCS index table used. [End CB014045-AB]

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-3**  (ID: `12492829`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Comparison of the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR and the required SINR before FD

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12492830`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation For the selection of the best suitable MCS, gNB shall start the comparison of the rescaled corrected average WB-SINR (which is the value after decreasing MPR and DelatMPR256QAM) and the required SINR ((5G_UP_ALG_17277_replaced([11131660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_kovdcPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of the highest MCS available for UL scheduling (see [11164067](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25qg9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)). Different tables shall specify the required SINR depending on the rank applied by the UL scheduler.

The input shall also include the number of PRBs for determination MPR value.

If the (rescaled corrected average WB-SINR - DeltaMPR256QAM for the MCS to be evaluated)>= required SINR for the MCS to be evaluated , then

  * The rescaled corrected average WB-SINR satisfied the required SINR.



Else,

  * The rescaled corrected average WB-SINR does not satisfy the required SINR.



Where:

  * MPR(n): Given the number of PUSCH PRBs to be evaluated, gNB shall determine MPR before FD as[12472295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Go7EsQ3TEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)
  * DeltaMPR256QAM shall be determined as[12492824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_APKnUBL3EfCph-OiSyk16Q)

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-4**  (ID: `12472297`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Maximum UL MCS for high reliability mode before FD

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12472298`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation This requirement is only applied into FR1 as high reliability LA mode is only supported in FR1.

In case of transmission of PUSCH, , if UE is configured with LowSE MCS table and works in high reliability LA mode, the max MCS is:

  * NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaMcsMax64qamLowSERANK1HR while UE works with RANK1
  * NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaMcsMax64qamLowSERANK2HR while UE works with RANK2



In case of transmission of PUSCH, if UE is configured with 64QAM MCS table and works in high reliability LA mode, the max MCS is:

  * NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaMcsMax64qamRANK1HR while UE works with RANK1
  * NRCELL.puschHrLaConfig.ullaMcsMax64qamRANK2HR while UE works with RANK2

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-5**  (ID: `12472295`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Determine MPR before FD

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12472296`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Given the number of PUSCH PRBs to be evaluated, gNB shall determine MPR before FD as legacy ([11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_dX6UEfvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11131894](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_l0YKEPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) which is summarized as below.

  * If the R&D parameter rdMprActive (see [11185224](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wysPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) is set to 1 or to 2 and for the deployment defined by rdMprActiveFddTdd (see [11185228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wysfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) and UE is power limited (defined by [11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
  * MPR = rdMprFdd (see [11185245](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) if the number of PUSCH PRBs to be evaluated is greater than size of bandwidth specific inner RB area in FDD deployment
  * MPR = rdMprTddFr1 (see [11185252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wytfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) if the number of PUSCH PRBs to be evaluated is greater than size of bandwidth specific inner RB area in TDD FR1 deployment
  * MPR = 0 in all other cases
  * If the R&D parameter rdMprActive is set to 0 or if the gNB is configured for the bands defined with R&D parameter rdMprDisableBandsFr1 (see [11185218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27wLr_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) or if the gNB is setup for a DSS configuration (NRCELL.lteNrDssMode != 0).
  * MPR is always 0



Where:

  * Size of bandwidth specific inner RB area is floor(the number of PRBs of cell bandwidth / 2).



When this requirement is referred by other requirements, it can be written in form of MPR(n), n is the number of PUSCH PRBs to be evaluated.

Note that for UE configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA it shall be the same as legacy [11131660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_kovdcPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), i.e, as below:

For UE configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA:

  * The rescaled corrected average WB-SINR shall not be decreased by the configured MPR, if the ILLA is performed at UL SINR reporting before resource allocation in FD.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-6**  (ID: `12492824`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Determine DeltaMPR256QAM before FD

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12492825`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Given a MCS to be evaluated, gNB shall determine DeltaMPR256QAM before FD as below.

If the R&D parameter rdMprQam256ActiveFddTdd (see [11184869](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27uWcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_5KBG5p5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) is enabled for current technology and If UE is power limited (defined by [11130171](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-_ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and NRCELL.actUl256Qam is enabled and UE is in 256QAM mode (then UE is scheduled with Table 5.1.3.1-2 for 256QAM) and the MCS to be evaluated is MCS20 <= MCS <= MCS27

  * DeltaMPR256QAM = 3dB



Else

  * DeltaMPR256QAM = 0dB



Endif

When this requirement is referred by other requirements, it can be written in form of DeltaMPR256QAM (m), m is the MCS to be evaluated.

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-7**  (ID: `12493068`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Determine expected number of Priority PRBs for power limited UE by (decreasing MCS, increasing PRBs) method

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `12493069`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation For a power limited UE this algorithm looks for the best (prb, mcs) combination which allows to drain as much data as possible from the considered buffer (ueTargetBuffer). The search goes in the direction of lowering the mcs and using the corresponding SINR gain to increase the number of PRBs. This algorithm shall only be applicable to priority bearers (GBR/NBR/VoNR/MAC-CE). 

Input:

  * (PRB_current, MCS_current, SINR_current) = (PRB_start, MCS_start, SINR_start)
  * (PRB_N, MCS_N, SINR_N) = (PRB_start, MCS_start, SINR_start)
  * rrmMaxNumPuschPrb = the upper limit of the number of PUSCH PRBs;
  * ueTargetBuffer = considered amount of data to drain
  * procedureScope = "bufferDrain"



where

  * (PRB_start, MCS_start, SINR_start) is defined in [11201086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwULYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/bi_kwulyfvsee-aqvopbp1qhq?oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconfiguration%2f9")



Procedure:

IF( (TBS(PRB_current, MCS_current) >= ueTargetBuffer) AND (procedureScope == "bufferDrain") )

{

Calculate the number of PRBs needed to empty ueTargetBuffer as if the UE is not power limited and assign the calculated number of PRBs to PRB_current;

“return (PRB_current, MCS_current)”

}

WHILE (PRB_current < rrmMaxNumPuschPrb AND MCS_current > MCS0)

{

MCS_current = MCS_current – 1;

SINR_diff = SINR_current – reqSINR(MCS_current) – MPR(PRB_current) – DeltaMPR256QAM(MCS_current);

IF (SINR_diff < 0) { break; }

PRB_temp = min(floor(PRB_current * linear(SINR_diff)), rrmMaxNumPuschPrb);

IF( (MPR(PRB_temp) > 0) AND (MPR(PRB_current) == 0)

{

PRB_temp = min(floor(PRB_current * linear(SINR_diff – MPR(PRB_temp))), rrmMaxNumPuschPrb);

PRB_temp = max(PRB_temp, size of bandwidth specific inner RB area);

}

SINR_current = SINR_current – dB(PRB_temp) + dB(PRB_current);

PRB_current = PRB_temp;

TBS_current = TBS(PRB_current, MCS_current);

IF( TBS_current > =TBS(PRB_N, MCS_N) )

{

MCS_N = MCS_current;

PRB_N = PRB_current;

SINR_N = SINR_current;

IF( (procedureScope == "bufferDrain") AND (TBS_current >= ueTargetBuffer) )

{

break; 

}

}

}

Output:

if procedureScope == "bufferDrain"

  * (PRB_N, MCS_N): best (prb, mcs) combination to drain ueTargetBuffer;



Where

  * PRB_N: the max number of PRBs for algorithm intention
  * MCS_N: the MCS associated with PRB_N
  * SINR_N: the rescaled corrected average SINR associated with PRB_N
  * MPR(n): Given the number of PUSCH PRBs to be evaluated, gNB shall determine MPR before FD as ([12472295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Go7EsQ3TEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ))
  * DeltaMPR256QAM shall be determined as legacy according to [12492824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_APKnUBL3EfCph-OiSyk16Q)
  * dB(x) = 10 * log10(x)
  * linear(x) = 10 ^ (x/10)
  * TBS( the number of PRBs, the MCS): is to calculate the TBS as [11203344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwejfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * reqSINR(x) = required SINR corresponding to mcs-index x in the used sinr2mcs LUT in [11132202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nYK4EPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-8**  (ID: `13406690`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Determine expected number of non-GBR PRBs for power limited UE

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `13406706`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation For a power limited UE, this algorithm calculates the maximum feasible PRB allocation in order to drain the UE buffer.

Input:

  * PRB_N, MCS_N , SINR_N from [12472293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kRoEYg3SEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).



Procedure:

If the data in the UE buffer can be flushed out with (PRB_N, MCS_N),{

  * PRB_bufferDrain shall be calculated as the smallest number of PRBs such that TBS(PRB_bufferDrain, MCS_N) >= non-GBR + GBR/VoNR/NBR/MAC-CE bytes for the current UE)
  * PRB_bufferDrain = PRB_bufferDrain - (GBR/VoNR/NBR/MAC-CE allocation for the current UE)
  * PRB_MaxFeasibleAllocation = min(PRB_bufferDrain, remaining PRBs in UE's BWP after PRB allocations given to GBR/VoNR/NBR/MAC-CE for all scheduled UEs in the current slot)}



Else {

  * SINR_Diff = SINR_N - SINR_MCS0
  * PRBmax_mcs0 shall be clculated as the smallest number of PRBs such that TBS(PRBmax_mcs0, MCS0) >= non-GBR + GBR/VoNR/NBR/MAC-CE bytes for the current UE
  * PRBmax_mcs0 = PRBmax_mcs0 - GBR/VoNR/NBR/MAC-CE allocation size of current UE.
  * PRB_MaxFeasibleAllocation = min(PRBmax_mcs0, nATB, remaining PRBs in UEs BWP after GBR/VoNR/NBR/MAC-CE etc. for all scheduled UEs in the current slot).



}

Output:

  * PRB_MaxFeasibleAllocation



Where

  * SINR_MCS0: Required SINR for MCS0
  * nATB can be found by solving 10 _log10(nATB) - 10_ log10(PRB_N) = SINR_Diff
  * GBR/VoNR/NBR/MAC-CE allocation for the UE is the output of [12493068](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Q8WaEBNqEfCph-OiSyk16Q).

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-9**  (ID: `12495965`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation The number of PRB Local Optimization

---

**3.8.3.1.0-11.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `12495966`)

Inner Loop UL Link Adaptation Given a power limited UE and the number of PUSCH PRBs, this requirement defines the algorithm to try to find a smaller number of PRBs with the equal or larger TBS. The procedure is called PRB local optimization.

For power limited UE, when the number of PRBs is reduced in power limited status, the SINR per PRB is increased, hence it may support a higher MCS. A higher MCS with a smaller number of PRBs may provide a larger TBS. 

Input:

  * (rrmUlProposedMcs, rrmMaxNumPrbUl, rrmRescaledCorrAgSinr) as calculated in [12472327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_TMb5gQ3cEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ).
  * PRB_maxFeasible: the maximum expected number of PRBs which can be given to the UE, including PRBs for priority bearers ([12493068](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Q8WaEBNqEfCph-OiSyk16Q)) and for non-GBR ( [13406690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-W9DBQ1xEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
  * PRB_PreOptimization: [Before PR860924] the input number of PRBs which comes from ([11200194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [PR860924]Total PRBs allocated to the UE from [11201086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwULYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) (including PRBs from [Before CB014045-CA]WRR ([11200194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))[CB014045-CA]either WRR ([11200194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwRvK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) or UL-ES ([12546833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_8sJ8MCNgEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [End CB014045-CA] and Priority PRBs)[End PR860924]



Procedure Overview:

  1. If PRB_PreOptimization <= rrmMaxNumPrbUl, then
  2. PRB_PreOptimization is the final output
  3. Exit Procedure



EndIf

  1. Calculate MCS_PreOptimization: the MCS associated with PRB_PreOptimization,
  2. Let MCS_Optimization = MCS_PreOptimization + 1
  3. Deduce PRB_Optimization: the number of PRBs associated with MCS_Optimization.
  4. Calculate TBS_ PreOptimization: the TBS provided by (PRB_PreOptimization, MCS_PreOptimization)
  5. Calculate TBS_ Optimization: the TBS provided by (PRB_Optimization, MCS_Optimization)
  6. If TBS_ Optimization >= TBS_ PreOptimization, then
  7. PRB_Optimization is the final output
  8. Else
  9. PRB_PreOptimization is the final output
  10. EndIf



Procedure:

[Before PR860924]IF( PRB_PreOptimization <= rrmMaxNumPrbUl) // the UE is not power limited over PRB_PreOptimization

{

PRB_Optimized = PRB_PreOptimization;

"Exit the procedure";

}

[PR860924]

If (UE is not power limited i.e., PRB_PreOptimization <= rrmMaxNumPrbUl)  
{  
PRB Local optimization algorithm shall not be executed and PRB_Optimized shall be set to PRB_PreOptimization;  
"Exit the procedure”;  
}

[End PR860924]

// calculate the rescaled corrected average SINR associated with PRB_PreOptimization, and the corresponding MCS:

SINR_PreOptimization = rrmRescaledCorrAgSinr + dB(rrmMaxNumPrbUl) – dB(PRB_PreOptimization);

MCS_PreOptimization = { largest MCS index i: SINR_PreOptimization >= reqSinr(i) }; 

TBS_OptimizedOutput = TBS(PRB_PreOptimization, MCS_PreOptimization);

PRB_OptimizedOutput = PRB_PreOptimization;

MCS_OptimizedOutput = MCS_Optimization = MCS_PreOptimization;

// Refer to [12492829](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_975c0RL5EfCph-OiSyk16Q "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fmd_tauaapvfee-aqvopbp1qhq&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconfiguration%2f9&artifactinmodule=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_975c0rl5efcph-oisyk16q&componenturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2frm-projects%2f_t-lvkj5eee2a-5u7tzedra%2fcomponents%2f_ubjxej5eee2a-5u7tzedra") for SINR comparison. MCS_PreOptimization <= rrmUlProposedMcs, therefore searching can be started from rrmUlProposedMcs

WHILE (maxNumOfIterations > 0)

{

MCS_Optimization = MCS_Optimization + 1;

SINR_Diff = reqSinr(MCS_Optimization) + DeltaMPR256QAM(MCS_Optimization) – SINR_PreOptimization - DeltaMPR256QAM(MCS_PreOptimization);

IF( 0 < SINR_Diff <= (rrmRescaledCorrAgSinr – SINR_PreOptimization) )

{

PRB_Optimization = floor(PRB_PreOptimization / linear(SINR_Diff));

[Before CB014045-AB]

IF( MPR(PRB_Optimization) == 0 AND MPR(PRB_PreOptimization) > 0 )

{

SINR_Diff = SINR_Diff - MPR(PRB_PreOptimization);

IF( 0 < SINR_Diff <= (rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr – SINR_PreOptimization) )

{

PRB_Optimization = floor(PRB_PreOptimization / linear(SINR_Diff));

}

}

[End CB014045-AB]

IF( PRB_Optimization <= rrmMaxNumPrbUl)

{

PRB_OptimizedOutput = rrmMaxNumPrbUl;

MCS_OptimizedOutput = rrmUlProposedMcs;

End Procedure.

} endif

}

ELSE

{

PRB_OptimizedOutput = rrmMaxNumPrbUl;

MCS_OptimizedOutput = rrmUlProposedMcs;

End Procedure.

} endif

IF( TBS(PRB_Optimization, MCS_Optimization) >= TBS_OptimizedOutput AND CR(PRB_Optimization, MCS_Optimization) <= rdMaxPuschEffectiveCodeRate ) //rdMaxPuschEffectiveCodeRate (defined by [11132055](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_mnBvAPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

{

TBS_OptimizedOutput = TBS_Optimization;

PRB_OptimizedOutput = PRB_Optimization;

MCS_OptimizedOutput = MCS_Optimization;

tbsImproveCounter = 0;

}

ELSE

{

tbsImproveCounter = tbsImproveCounter + 1;

if (tbsImproveCounter == 2){ End procedure}

}

maxNumOfIterations = maxNumOfIterations - 1;

}

Output

  * PRB_OptimizedOutput: the number of PRBs after optimization, it may be smaller than PRB_PreOptimization.
  * TBS_OptimizedOutput and MCS_OptimizedOutput



Where

  * MPR(n): Given the number of PUSCH PRBs to be evaluated, gNB shall determine MPR before FD as [12472295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Go7EsQ3TEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)
  * DeltaMPR256QAM shall be determined as [12492824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_APKnUBL3EfCph-OiSyk16Q)
  * dB(x) = 10 * log10(x)
  * linear(x) = 10 ^ (x/10)
  * TBS( the number of PRBs, the MCS): is to calculate the TBS as [11203344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwejfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
  * reqSINR(x) = required SINR corresponding to mcs-index x in the used sinr2mcs LUT in [11132202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_nYK4EPvKEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).
  * CR(x,y) is defined in [11124515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX__bh_4PvJEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).
  * maxNumOfIterations is the maximum number of iterations for local PRB optimization. If MCS_PreOptimization < 4, it is set to rdUlLocalPrbOptIterLowerMcsRange ([13455035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bCqwsSxXEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), otherwise it is set to rdUlLocalPrbOptIterUpperMcsRange (see [13408307](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NyHMxw5fEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

---

### 3.8.3.2 Outer Loop UL Link Adaptation

#### 3.8.3.2.0-1 Outer Loop UL Link Adaptation OLLA offset evaluation (ID: 11137862)

**3.8.3.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11137866`)

Outer Loop UL Link Adaptation Evaluation of the delta SINR based on HARQ feedback

---

**3.8.3.2.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11137872`)

Outer Loop UL Link Adaptation Overview

* * *

---

**3.8.3.2.0-1.0-1.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11137894`)

Outer Loop UL Link Adaptation The gNB shall evaluate the delta SINR based on HARQ feedback as following.

\- Skip delta SINR evaluation, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11054_replaced([11137899](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krcSd_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- Evaluation of Delta SINR, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11058_replaced([11137940](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krcSfvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- Evaluation of the initial delta SINR, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11060_replaced([11138025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krc5hvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- If NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 8 [CB010708-C] or 16 [End CB010708-C],

For the UEs whose data transmission is with UL MU-MIMO, a separate OLLA loop shall be supported. OLLA shall calculate the Delta SINR for MU-MIMO based on the HARQ ACK/NACK corresponding to PUSCH transmission in MU-MIMO mode. The Delta SINR for MU-MIMO mode is used only in the occassion that PUSCH transmission is in UL MU-MIMO mode and only used in FD scheduler.
